name: Joshua Scott for Congress
subject: Joshua Scott Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joshua Scott for Congress
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hG_UbVrdY2fBCP.&b=TLhiIGWII2lAYHRr3rVnwg

Peter

I hope you've been well. It's a shame that we have not been able to utilize these past two months to execute a robust ground game and ride our momentum after becoming the top performing Republican congressional campaign in Los Angeles County for the March 3 primary election, but there's still some good news. The people of district 32 and all throughout the state of California are not buying what our state government is selling, and are giving some serious pushback to the unconstitutional executive orders that are selectively closing our businesses and restricting our movement. It's crazy to think that they actually tried to shut down our houses of worship and enforce mandatory face covering...

Anyway, the energy coming out of the San Gabriel Valley to support our campaign has been amazing. Due to high demand, we met with some supporters in the community on Memorial Day, talked politics, drank great coffee, and paid respects to our heroes who made the ultimate sacrifice.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hG_UbVrdY2fBCP.&b=TLhiIGWII2lAYHRr3rVnwg

Donate

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hG_UbVrdY2fBCP.&b=Nc9EErqHlz4v2eWBsyclwA

It's safe to say that the momentum has shifted to team freedom, and our campaign loves being leaders in this fight. I can't wait to keep grinding it out for the rest of the year to be a part of history. We hope to have you along the for the ride.

See you soon.

Joshua Scott

www.votejoshuascott.org

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Blog Update 05/27/20
body:
Biden in hiding, where is Joe? No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Trump vs Biden](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-j/)
In this week's blog post I discuss the state of the presidential campaign between President Trump and Joe Biden. How has the coronavirus pandemic changed the race? Who do I think will win? And, why is Biden hunkered down in his basement? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [A Missed Opportunity](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-d/)
Nancy Pelosi's House of Representatives got together last week to vote on legislation crafted by the Democrats - without input from the Republicans. In this week's blog, I discuss this "messaging" bill, which does nothing to help cope with the coronavirus challenge and has no chance at becoming law. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Reopening America - Safely](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-u/)
For about two months now, much of America has been more or less shut down due to the COVID-19 pandemic. In this week's blog, I discuss President Trump's Reopen America Task Force and Ohio's reopening plan, known as the Responsible RestartOhio Plan. There will be challenges, however I think we Americans will prevail! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [COVID-19 and Murder Hornets](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-n/)
In my blog this week, I discuss how our lives have changed during this time of COVID-19 and to make matters worse, now we have to worry about an insect invasion! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkfvz-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---

name: Team Fitzgerald
subject: We'll be back, and we'll be better than ever.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Changing tactics and making adjustments No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-psludt-ahkdjtlkr-n/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-psludt-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Dear Peter,Like so many of us these past few months, our campaign has had to throw our "expected" playbook out the window and adjust on the fly.**But we will NEVER stop fighting for what's right in Wisconsin** - a strong economy, national security, family values, and the freedom and opportunity that this country was founded on.But our campaign is facing a new set of challenges. Part of the "old" campaign playbook was plenty of in-person events - rallies, parades, community festivals, and fundraising events. We'll get back to that soon enough, but for now, we're adjusting and moving more of our fundraising efforts online. **Will you help us?** [Join Online - $10](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-psludt-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Join Online - $25](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-psludt-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [Join Online - $100](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-psludt-ahkdjtlkr-t/) [Join Online - $200](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-psludt-ahkdjtlkr-i/) We still have a campaign to run. There are still petitions to be gathered, phone calls to be made, mail to be sent, and critical get-out-the-vote efforts in both the primary and the general election.And there's too much at stake for any of us to sit on the sidelines, with the future of our economy and our basic freedoms on the line!**[Can we count on you?](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-psludt-ahkdjtlkr-d/)**

Thanks,Team Fitzgerald
## **Join The Fight**

• Invite Your Friends
## **Support President Trump**
• Scott Fitzgerald was one of the earliest and most loyal Trump supporters in Wisconsin.
• President Trump needs allies like Scott Fitzgerald in Washington.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17651487/201907671/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDcyMWI5MS1lM2EwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ikDQmE4LrDFUlJq3d1guNL-MObktGl3wdJSNszSnRR8=&emci=e37286ef-8b9f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=d4721b91-e3a0-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Friends,

I’m reaching out with some exciting news: our campaign just received another endorsement — this time from the **Progressive Turnout Project**.

As a group hyper-focused on the most competitive districts in the country, we’re proud they’re a part of our movement.

It’s going to take a lot of work to flip this seat from red to blue and send Margaret to Congress. And while our latest endorsement is great news — we’re quickly approaching our end of month deadline, and we’re a bit short of our $15,000 online fundraising goal.

**[One of the best ways to support the campaign and help us stay competitive is to become a sustaining member by pledging a monthly contribution of $25 to ensure Margaret has the resources she needs to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17651488/201907672/788213855?refcode=em05282020&amount=%2425&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDcyMWI5MS1lM2EwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ikDQmE4LrDFUlJq3d1guNL-MObktGl3wdJSNszSnRR8=)**

If we’re going to get Margaret to Congress, we all need to work together to make sure she has the resources she needs to fight.

Thank you for being a part of this,

| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. body:
The Kentucky primary is less than a month away. Our team is building a voter education fund — to ensure everyone knows how to safely cast their absentee vote next month.

---
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17654020/201951050/1003843848?refcode=20200528_em_fr_eom3_all_hdr_atest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTViYjhhOS1mM2EwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFuMxLu3WMEhQyHvSYIimPgzgFBXJJfKDQWFkUpH7o8=)

| Voting is a fundamental and essential part of our democracy, friend. But many are unsure about how to safely vote in the upcoming primary. That’s why our team is pivoting to ensure everyone knows how to safely cast their absentee vote next month. **We’re hoping to raise $5,750 before the end of May for our voter education fund — and after just two days, we’re 31% of the way there!** _**[Can you pitch in $5 or $10 to help us reach voters across the state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17654022/201951052/1003843848?amount=5&refcode=20200528_em_fr_eom3_all_l1_atest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTViYjhhOS1mM2EwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFuMxLu3WMEhQyHvSYIimPgzgFBXJJfKDQWFkUpH7o8=)**_ The Kentucky primary is less than a month away. And Governor Andy Beshear has issued an executive order allowing all registered voters in Kentucky to request absentee ballots. That means all voters can vote absentee by mail in the upcoming primary, as long as ballots are requested by June 15th at midnight. This is the right step for the Commonwealth to take, and it’s an important test run for the November elections. But voting absentee by mail is new and the process may be confusing for those of us who haven’t voted absentee before. _**[If you’re able, can you pitch in today to help us reach our goal? Even $5 or $10 will go a long way to helping our team reach thousands of voters before the primary!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17654024/201951054/686344753?refcode=20200528_em_fr_eom3_all_l2_atest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTViYjhhOS1mM2EwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFuMxLu3WMEhQyHvSYIimPgzgFBXJJfKDQWFkUpH7o8=)**_ _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17654029/201951059/1003843848?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=20200528_em_fr_eom3_all_abx5_atest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTViYjhhOS1mM2EwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFuMxLu3WMEhQyHvSYIimPgzgFBXJJfKDQWFkUpH7o8=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Phil=20Scott?=
body:
First of all, I want to thank you for the support you’ve given me over the years. I would not be governor today without your help and encouragement. |
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=ba03d5a9d9&e=19cebfe173) | [Share](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3128f88de9&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=87e75fade5&e=19cebfe173) | [Tweet](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=99dbe07d4f&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5c89729772&e=19cebfe173) | [Forward to a Friend](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5c89729772&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| Friend,
---
| First of all, I want to thank you for the support you’ve given me over the years. I would not be governor today without your help and encouragement. I will always be honored by the trust and responsibility Vermonters have placed in me.

So, I wanted to let you know that, this morning, I filed for re-election.

While I hope to earn your vote in August and November, these are not normal times and this will not be a normal campaign.

As our state and nation continue to navigate a once-in-a-century challenge, Vermonters need and deserve a full-time governor who is focused on leading Vermont through the public health and economic crisis COVID-19 has created.

I know this may seem a bit odd coming from someone in my position, but I can honestly say the least favorite part of my experience in public service has been the politics. Far too many people get elected to satisfy their egos, and use their newly found power for ideological reasons or for the satisfaction of taking credit for things they have or haven’t done. I’ve always felt that what we actually need are more public servants - people who make sacrifices to help others, not themselves or special interests. That’s what I’ve tried to do throughout my time in public life. And, I think it’s more important now than ever before.

We have so much to do to help protect public health and restart and revitalize our economy. So, here’s the bottom line: I will not be campaigning in the traditional way while we are in the midst of our response to this pandemic. Facing, fighting and defeating this virus - and rebuilding a stronger, more resilient economy - are my top priorities.

This means, until the state of emergency is over, I won’t have a campaign staff or office, be raising money, or participating in normal campaign events.

I will remain solely focused on fulfilling my responsibilities and serving the state I love.

I realize the risks - I will be facing at least one other candidate in the August primary, and there are well organized candidates from other parties who have been asking for money and campaigning throughout this crisis. I’m sure the political consultants would tell me my decision not to campaign at this time is a mistake.

But, I simply cannot bring myself to campaign during the state of emergency, even if it puts me at a political disadvantage in August and November.

I thank you for your ongoing commitment to helping us fight this virus and recover stronger than we were before. We will get through this by staying united as Vermonters and doing our part to put the safety, security and prosperity of our state ahead of politics.

Sincerely,

Phil Scott

---

I would not be governor today without your help and encouragement. | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | Friend, | First of all, I want to thank you for the support you’ve given me over the years. I would not be governor today without your help and encouragement. I will always be honored by the trust and responsibility Vermonters have placed in me. So, I wanted to let you know that, this morning, I filed for re-election. While I hope to earn your vote in August and November, these are not normal times and this will not be a normal campaign. As our state and nation continue to navigate a once-in-a-century challenge, Vermonters need and deserve a full-time governor who is focused on leading Vermont through the public health and economic crisis COVID-19 has created. I know this may seem a bit odd coming from someone in my position, but I can honestly say the least favorite part of my experience in public service has been the politics. Far too many people get elected to satisfy their egos, and use their newly found power for ideological reasons or for the satisfaction of taking credit for things they have or haven’t done. I’ve always felt that what we actually need are more public servants - people who make sacrifices to help others, not themselves or special interests. That’s what I’ve tried to do throughout my time in public life. And, I think it’s more important now than ever before. We have so much to do to help protect public health and restart and revitalize our economy. So, here’s the bottom line: I will not be campaigning in the traditional way while we are in the midst of our response to this pandemic. Facing, fighting and defeating this virus - and rebuilding a stronger, more resilient economy - are my top priorities. This means, until the state of emergency is over, I won’t have a campaign staff or office, be raising money, or participating in normal campaign events. I will remain solely focused on fulfilling my responsibilities and serving the state I love. I realize the risks - I will be facing at least one other candidate in the August primary, and there are well organized candidates from other parties who have been asking for money and campaigning throughout this crisis. I’m sure the political consultants would tell me my decision not to campaign at this time is a mistake. But, I simply cannot bring myself to campaign during the state of emergency, even if it puts me at a political disadvantage in August and November. I thank you for your ongoing commitment to helping us fight this virus and recover stronger than we were before. We will get through this by staying united as Vermonters and doing our part to put the safety, security and prosperity of our state ahead of politics. Sincerely, Phil Scott | | | | | | | | | | | | Phil Scott for Vermont, Glen Wright, Treasurer, P.O. Box 988, Montpelier, VT, 05601 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or

Peter,
We have 3 days left to meet our end of the month fundraising deadline. Right now we’re $7,890 short and need your help. [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Donald Trump is doing everything in his power to prevent no-excuse absentee voting across this country – and Tennessee’s GOP leadership is doing everything they can to help him . Despite several lawsuits filed citing concerns over Covid-19 and the safety of Tennessee voters, Gov. Lee and his minions are stopping at nothing.
That’s why we’re fighting so hard. That’s why the TNDP is using every resource including our Voter Protection program to hit back. This shouldn’t be about partisanship, it should be about ensuring that all votes are counted safely and fairly.
From legal fees to advocacy and outreach, the bills are racking up. Will you donate right now and help us? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2] Our country cannot afford 4 more years of this.

name: Mark Warner
subject: Final push to Election Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Chuck for Congress, Inc
body:
The primary is NEXT TUESDAY... and we need additional volunteers! Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/8afb65f4a5fed091/e8f0164638d17188c3d6b838967d376c/33363) Fellow Hoosier, We have JUST DAYS to go until the primary election next Tuesday, June 2... and it’s all hands on deck. We’re working around the clock to win. Dr. Chuck is running in a crowded field, and it’s a competitive race. Every vote is going to count. Will you help ensure that we leave no stone unturned? **I’m writing to ask you to JOIN US in the push to get out the vote for Dr. Chuck!** We’re getting ready to kick off our final door-to-door blitz, and we need additional volunteers. This effort to reach Republican voters and get them to the polls on Tuesday is critical. In fact, it could make ALL the difference between victory and defeat. If you’re interested in joining us, we’ve love to have your help. We’ve developed a set of safety precautions to keep everyone safe. Health is Dr. Chuck’s number one priority. Let me know if you’d like to help. You can contact me directly at **[mark@drchuckforcongress.com](mailto:mark@drchuckforcongress.com)**. I know you agree we need a proven real-word leader like Dr. Chuck fighting for our Hoosier values in Congress. We need a ‘Doctor in the House’. But we need to win on Tuesday to have a chance at getting Dr. Chuck to Congress. We can’t afford to fall short. It’s crunch time, Fellow Hoosier. Even if you only have a couple hours to spare, it will be a huge help. I hope to hear from you! Mark Warner
**[mark@drchuckforcongress.com](mailto:mark@drchuckforcongress.com)** | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/8afb65f4a5fed091/4ad1c4d57e69ffacc3d6b838967d376c/33363) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/8afb65f4a5fed091/0714a6e991f26b60c3d6b838967d376c/33363)

Team,
Looking back on our campaign, I couldn't be more proud of the race we ran together. With your support, we shone a spotlight on the most vulnerable Americans and put people — not politics or special interests — first. I couldn't have done it without you.
That's why I'm proud to share with you the launch of People First Future, a new organization that will elect bold, progressive candidates whose campaigns are putting people first.
[**Can I count with your support to build a People First Future?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17656704/201982187/-1689950957?refcode=em20200528-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWZmMzBjMC1mY2EwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9mcknXkOv2qRwTlQ7HPtCT_3HrfLjhZgpLUrhkAfWZ4=)
[****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17656705/201982188/-1689950957?refcode=em20200528-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWZmMzBjMC1mY2EwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9mcknXkOv2qRwTlQ7HPtCT_3HrfLjhZgpLUrhkAfWZ4=)
This is a difficult time for so many Americans. Millions have lost loved ones or gotten sick, and many more have lost their jobs, their health care, their housing, or their financial security.
The coronavirus has highlighted the deepest gaps in our social safety net and shown us just how many Americans are one missed paycheck away from poverty. That's why it's never been more important to elect leaders who are focused on helping people.
More than ever, we need to elect leaders in our statehouses, school boards, governor's offices, and in Congress who will fight for hardworking families trying to get by and for those people who need them most.
People First Future will do just that. We will invest in a new generation of bold, progressive leaders whose campaigns aren't powered by big donors, party politics, or special interests — but instead by the people they hope to serve.
Candidates like Candace Valenzuela in Texas's 24th district, who overcame homelessness to become an educator and champion for her community. Or Lauren Underwood in Illinois's 14th District, a registered nurse who is fighting for affordable, accessible health care for every American. Or Lucy McBath in Georgia's 6th district, who after losing her son to gun violence, dedicated herself to fighting for common sense gun safety legislation.
These are the kinds of leaders we need fighting for us, especially as our nation recovers from an unprecedented crisis. But they need your help.
**[If you want to be a part of shaping a People First Future, I hope you'll join me. Sign up to hear about the candidates we support, and chip in what you can to help us get them elected.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17656706/201982189/-1689950957?refcode=em20200528-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWZmMzBjMC1mY2EwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9mcknXkOv2qRwTlQ7HPtCT_3HrfLjhZgpLUrhkAfWZ4=)**
Together, we can shrink the power of big donors and special interests and build an America where people are our top priority.
I hope you'll join me.
Best wishes,
Julián
****[Contribute →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17656707/201982190/-1689950957?refcode=em20200528-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWZmMzBjMC1mY2EwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9mcknXkOv2qRwTlQ7HPtCT_3HrfLjhZgpLUrhkAfWZ4=)****

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Help the American People, Not Politicians
body:
In the hardest of times, Nancy Pelosi and her liberal agenda have devoted national spending to help her personal projects [ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=43df1baf4f4f494e8090d626207677f9&_e=W8nJFSmrqfMPEevIzjiNOGSEoiHgevXJ8Z6K60VlOOMq9gK6MmgyN35bLHCpWjKGMN_jIzB86nzr4gAKi0XQqyH_-9dHCiKISyCFjhBvtmchm9TuTFUl2d94RmmUE3f0uJbTYrNSgVvGF7NjoaW7W9UQ_2CQlrH75LjoDlP8uN6I3WRw7d_06ozTHZ6SFjaXR5IkBraqI1kFuM32PxjLnyf0MTS9iBwPyt8ZN5kJ1oLyttquR2IgrlGc16jUxDL38ZX6NhUqY91KgY82PbC8c-uRffzI5XiocT3x47_184NWRSpsUON_0IQPzMF4IsD5DdMR-VN4kkt0YTe5GQBvvdEzfJj_EqcDFxbpOn98rl0%3D) In the hardest of times, Nancy Pelosi and her liberal agenda have devoted national spending to help her personal projects, like Harvard and the Kennedy Center, rather than helping the American people struggling to survive during this crisis. Democrats have made it clear that they are willing to crush our economy if it leads to Trump's loss. Now, they intend on using taxpayer dollars to bail out politicians? [**FIGHT BACK**](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=43df1baf4f4f494e8090d626207677f9&_e=W8nJFSmrqfMPEevIzjiNOCpplSCl-WWNSazZenlMbK3FcZxrDZ5Gbtte_nQl89_fyN25fNtSox5hNkAlXRi9sriBa7lNmuxjjuHpo5o_WEpBQIvBu6OBI7D-ex6Vb5ORlBSZ5CAifoHyHZJywlAPLa08PH3vh45FH3LNGyta55KBV6a0z_Hm83uDD4tpIJJD5lFh6lZg6HtbpNjbTbYhJSdH6INGJIoQpAl36qWNQ4LyfkGCjygSSxtr-pvAiiT6zII2wdA5tMkufPJTbGnBIeansEt0pwfTQ83zxNFQtc4jhiwO3V65NUgRNWBWqfbF0SYxhdbl2EnhJNflQYQEtBq9lrryVDSWsw4Csi5o7MzafiazqvUhwhWAfOlPkzQ76kbz8Eq4Vnd66eVfzxbxXA%3D%3D) [ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=43df1baf4f4f494e8090d626207677f9&_e=W8nJFSmrqfMPEevIzjiNOCpplSCl-WWNSazZenlMbK3FcZxrDZ5Gbtte_nQl89_fyN25fNtSox5hNkAlXRi9sriBa7lNmuxjjuHpo5o_WEpBQIvBu6OBI7D-ex6Vb5ORlBSZ5CAifoHyHZJywlAPLa08PH3vh45FH3LNGyta55KBV6a0z_Hm83uDD4tpIJJD_Y3mrmeXG8BVfsKqZrJF0KWWaj5muE6zqdUqPWCipFf6-npLkAYn35wxSi7plmgQSpc3QAFIMOtYKevpysLyIGYkeeI4tm905iOgUljEo6PjvJWnybZrfUPlWp8YFIueVruy57Y8Tv0GIQW4RRdtzTXIRjsfJ7C-UY5lJb3YInIH69rNLOVVyrx3cTZsqrZ4rWyY-Fb95uUjxBRa4FQKWQ%3D%3D) | |

As I’ve said, Pelosi and her allies have already done enough damage to our economy, hoping that Trump will lose due to the fallout of the COVID-19 shutdown. Now, she wants a bailout, using hardworking taxpayer dollars to compensate for the incompetent Democrat politicians who shot themselves in the foot with reckless and ill-advised spending.

We will not sit back and watch as she and her other Democratic Party leaders try to dream up a massive proposal for a state bailout.
[**_FIGHT BACK NOW!_**](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=43df1baf4f4f494e8090d626207677f9&_e=W8nJFSmrqfMPEevIzjiNOCpplSCl-WWNSazZenlMbK3FcZxrDZ5Gbtte_nQl89_fyN25fNtSox5hNkAlXRi9sriBa7lNmuxjjuHpo5o_WEpBQIvBu6OBI7D-ex6Vb5ORlBSZ5CAifoHyHZJywlAPLa08PH3vh45FH3LNGyta55KBV6a0z_Hm83uDD4tpIJJDLiU9GtZSBW2ACe8cNaHFgi222fpQltwPjyQcXXnukiAGbq07VSG6XzLxompLEKNoOM0-uYSAOl8tZog1fCSu7DL3_mj_ww5DQOyRlnHEEyOrp0EpmZuta4enwLQOgSA2xwaz5j1Oia-tRyH8BOqjWLKDhyTmRwFrW44CmDGGCD6GtboVGrQVbv_Ykg2i-zTEYyon-75cyjUD5wCuaMiHqQ%3D%3D)
At the center of this crisis should be improving the well-being and survival of the American people, not bailing out mismanaged and unsuccessful politicians.

Stand with us to remind and force Congress to help the American people, not the politicians.
[**DONATE HERE**](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=43df1baf4f4f494e8090d626207677f9&_e=W8nJFSmrqfMPEevIzjiNOCpplSCl-WWNSazZenlMbK3FcZxrDZ5Gbtte_nQl89_fyN25fNtSox5hNkAlXRi9sriBa7lNmuxjjuHpo5o_WEpBQIvBu6OBI7D-ex6Vb5ORlBSZ5CAifoHyHZJywlAPLa08PH3vh45FH3LNGyta55KBV6a0z_Hm83uDD4tpIJJDxRLXFm-gkJdzE2_3Yn0Ib6HIYtjdTtT74oDe4LfC4V--p5aiCUPyDSdlgYNHI9mYnnOKFiZZl8v10Y61CT9mja6zXoYBEzyv9s42CJaF3V8e9vdH3yQ_KB9j6wUTccoz8as_4AnIZ25L-gErBs5ucfec3yTIR9No941HXwkA_QkN5V8WyNV46hbIc_7Os6zApwr56YzsN4Qp3f16htdGBQ%3D%3D)

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: I stand with Brian
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
body:
I would like to take a moment to speak to you about Pennsylvania’s upcoming primary election. [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=8cd92930689740d6a8dd1afb76639834&_e=4EaF_NsPxTuNTKfjM3RA_SjW2eVX6yCMw3d35qqztGkDwuQ_jmnWu-T6_b1MOuSLZIiC_9hzgrrZO1ng8Kee-39gNYeIKCsOV86J1xfOJpprey3CRFixGTZ-F2CbU1gF2HfSWTALT7C-s_N7y4F2ucKdDaFSCUNqI1R3cPFwqGatVaONTs6yctknuvMG51Zo24RGExbLca7ngEJrrCbSqrb6QiWcsQ42VdU4DYIIbnaXYHGvh74F1ddtDHT3PIQYWth_xizaaTLmbV0Ao0SDavAmXj9OJgqKt2MDJE09dvf7w4mp0Zj3SUBeuW9sqMPzebXPsfukY2bERuTCvk1HT2F1sToiazLr2re5GZ5AEMY%3D) Friend, I would like to take a moment to speak to you about Pennsylvania’s upcoming primary election. On June 2nd, you have a chance to vote for a true leader that our nation needs back in Washington, and that’s why I strongly and proudly endorse my friend Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress. Having known and worked with Brian for several years, I’ve seen his love and passion for the people he represents in Pennsylvania. Having visited your district many times, what was clear to me is how connected Brian is to your community, and how much he understands the needs of his neighbors and the struggles they face every day. Brian plays a very pivotal role in Congress on so many critical issues, and our nation needs his leadership now more than ever. He is a fierce fighter and advocate for his constituents and he is truly deserving of re-election. [**Stand with Kevin and Brian**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=8cd92930689740d6a8dd1afb76639834&_e=4EaF_NsPxTuNTKfjM3RA_SjW2eVX6yCMw3d35qqztGkDwuQ_jmnWu-T6_b1MOuSLZIiC_9hzgrrZO1ng8Kee-39gNYeIKCsOV86J1xfOJpprey3CRFixGTZ-F2CbU1gF2HfSWTALT7C-s_N7y4F2uUVO5ZHV7Kk70IkeGkAqkCwhMBW-J43VeEleCvygMdUPO7OUnMv_B-Xon0nWh2S4HV_ci1fJA1rQJMrT3rNGsxctIt7XHx5T8nW__6X4t1N9VISMWgV6lRFjpR18_t3ANUF9gUm3FRxp5knA9R80GPlti4TyovPbq8eZkmsU3NSy9jdtUV9TrTVQIW4CGGzKJP2iw7xxucr2G3xzQA-3pZ8%3D) I want you to know that Brian has my full support and I humbly ask that you join me in standing with Brian, and standing with America, on June 2nd. I look forward to seeing you on my next visit to Brian’s district! Your friend, Kevin McCarthy

Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress

Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
PO Box 939
Langhorne, PA 19047
This email is sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress. To unsubscribe from future emails use this [link.](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_s=8cd92930689740d6a8dd1afb76639834&_t=bX7jy7T1gqKWD-Es0V1L8nn47QQdXsbGzJhm-hl9zWXuU86lIdX7DypAvzKFTxnVA5TrByMNLqQy53ZO9ckY9K6_XfA8isK5qGUL2bTe2DSfWpLd8LHFoRcwUbZaESZnCf0YTdjinP42kymkPT_4_uii5nvFJlucyMOlZEPh_yQ%3D)

name: Democrat Dirty Trick Alert
subject: LifeZette: Anti-Trump groups intervene in GOP NM House primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc
body:
Democrats don't want to face Claire Chase in the fall.
---
| | | | | | Anti-Trump groups intervene in GOP NM House primary LifeZette David Kamioner 5/28/2020 [https://www.lifezette.com/2020/05/anti-trump-groups-intervene-in-gop-nm-house-primary/?utm_source=right-rail-latest](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uko4Wpa1ssj8BAZFsaUuab9RIoSGqZxCAA2CIZth1aMUARe4n8SicQ3KnG7RsWDXqpoR1RuZqPaR8py92XzNWuKdSPnZ02cXPM3eXw8ok3YnPCiT06WAjWka6ur-QXMNMJjogY4racsOzeywDQ_IhVWl6bPaLIsJM93n21Snp_dWC6aAAwhK7fheVcU6paT4EieHaMYbJlBYrBcqKLg_ezIW0xjX5WldcKN0rOX9cpBQj0SC2_8_f6RotmusQzUO6Yn5-6Fgb0Fn05D28tQWuA==&c=fV5OC3BXMG4qI6qrULl9obs98O31IDvH9ccBggtbM57SsJJLcZn-TQ==&ch=GQnziEmtkguAFkKlQoZmMi8G58knk-UcpHe5YXWOn2_Ub-zVJoL-Yw==)
Anti-Trump groups and the PACs of Democrat national players are trying to stop the surging candidacy of pro-Trump GOP contender Claire Chase by donating large sums and running media for her anti-Trump primary opponent, Yvette Herrell. With a close race to be decided in a primary next Tuesday, Democrats and extremist progressives are doing all they can to ensure Herrell is the nominee, so they can easily beat her in the fall.
Patriot Majority, a PAC funded by Nancy Pelosi allies, Chuck Schumer's super PAC, and pro-abortion groups spent $250,000 in the last 10 days of the Republican primary in New Mexico's 2nd congressional district, attacking Claire Chase and supporting Yvette Herrell. On top of that, the leading feminist abortion rights group in the country, EMILY's List, is spending nearly $25,000 supporting Yvette Herrell and opposing Chase.
The EMILY's List mailers and Patriot Majority PAC ads falsely claim Claire Chase (a strong supporter of President Trump) opposes Trump. The dishonest spots also say Herrell --who recently bashed Trump and used taxpayer funds to attend a Never-Trumper conference in California (where a Trump pinata was hung so attendees could get a whack at the president)-- is a strong supporter of Trump.
Democrats and progs are heavily invested in Herrell because they know she is unelectable in the general election. She somehow managed to lose a district the president carried by 10 points in the 2016 race. That makes her easy pickings for the Democrats in 2020. Herrell's record, as opposed to Chase's longtime conservative credentials, leave a lot to be desired in a GOP nominee.
She took a pledge not to raise taxes and then voted for massive tax hikes on New Mexico families. Even worse, records show Herrell has repeatedly failed to pay her own property taxes on time. That's not something independent voters will embrace in the middle of a pandemic that is wreaking havoc on middle class pocketbooks--another reason the Democrats have clearly come to the conclusion that Yvette Herrell is the only candidate they have a chance of beating in November.
This is a small part of a larger Democrat tactic all over the nation. If Democrats posing as friends and fellow conservatives can intervene in GOP primaries, then they can choose who they want to face in the fall. It's like letting an NFL team pick their own schedule. In 2019, everyone would have wanted to play the Bengals and the Lions.
Pro-Trump Republicans from a successful private sector background, like Chase, are being targeted by these Pelosi- and Schumer-sponsored groups because they pose a threat not only to a Democrat retention of a House majority, but because once in office they will bring a perspective and expertise to legislation that will be anathema to Never-Trumpers and Democrats alike.
The primary is close and Chase has good momentum. But the sad fact is voters have been fooled before by RINOs like Herrell masquerading as Republicans. Conservatives and Republicans who want to see a real Trump supporter and solid conservative as a candidate should [support Claire Chase](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uko4Wpa1ssj8BAZFsaUuab9RIoSGqZxCAA2CIZth1aMUARe4n8SicQ3KnG7RsWDXmgDJ1Nqcleo3fbUX6_EMFRw2QXU5LUq2sQyvZP7KyFXTj08yE9U1hxxK65IJhvu7IylsF0xfPbT4iymQ2oUQVafFtILALrutoGc3KKXuQxo=&c=fV5OC3BXMG4qI6qrULl9obs98O31IDvH9ccBggtbM57SsJJLcZn-TQ==&ch=GQnziEmtkguAFkKlQoZmMi8G58knk-UcpHe5YXWOn2_Ub-zVJoL-Yw==).

name: Governor Ted Strickland
subject: Why I Support Betsy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Hello Peter, Ohio was facing many challenges before the pandemic struck this year - inadequate funding for our public schools, unaffordable healthcare, declining life expectancies due to problems like opioid addiction. The pandemic has only made our problems more challenging and it's a time when we need to elect true public servants to office -- people whose only goal is to improve the lives of Ohio's citizens. I hope you'll take a minute to let me share with you why **I believe it 's so important**** to elect Betsy Rader for State Senate **in November**.** In my time as Governor, Ohio was faced with the problems created by the 2008 recession -- job losses and foreclosures created by Republican policies that we had to try to remedy. I know what kind of leader and person it takes to get us on the right track. _And Betsy? She 's the real deal._ She was born in Appalachia, worked her way through The Ohio State University, and earned a full ride to Yale Law School. She went on to be an executive for a small business, Senior Counsel at the Cleveland Clinic, and now has her own employment law firm, but she's never stopped finding ways to lift up her neighbors. Regardless of party or optics, she will do what is right for State Senate District 18. Electing Betsy to this open seat in the State Senate is critical for families who need access to healthcare, education, good jobs, and so much more. But even more basic is the need to get level-headed people to re-draw our congressional districts. **Those we elect in 2020 will have the power to give elections back to the people by eliminating unfair partisan gerrymandering. ** **This race matters. Your support matters. We need you.** I'm eager to support Betsy and I know very well how much money it takes to run a good campaign that can reach voters. I know this is a difficult time with many needs, but electing good people to office really matters. If you can donate, I hope you will. __S__ __he has a big deadline coming up on May 29, and I know they 're close!__ It all adds up, so please consider a donation if you're able. Thanks so much for your time today. We'll get through this if we work together and do what's best for the people of Ohio. Sincerely, Ted [](https://act.myngp.com/el/YJE8k_iNWV3zJsSxoW9tFtS2O9ABxfSBZ3b-77mRTLA=/ZEgS63hnMHwwUdK5qytlDZESb5ZDC-qHUi20bGL7jY8=?refcode=gov)
---
Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
---

Novelty OH 44072 United States

name: TX Health Care Alert (via MJ Hegar)
subject: "John Cornyn decides ACA access is 'good news' after all" -- MSNBC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
But he's still standing by and doing nothing while his allies try to get the entire law struck down in court.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489002a/7f51f7bc/4e1ab50d/4ef69372/2622156367/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489002a/7f51f7bc/4e1ab50d/4ef69371/2622156367/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200528.1nd__1464__&amount=10")
---
Peter: After trying and failing _20 times_ to repeal the Affordable Care Act, Sen. John Cornyn now says it's "good news" that Americans who lose their jobs due to COVID-19 can get health care. Yes, you read that right!

But before you think Sen. Cornyn is going to start defending health care for _everyone_ , remember that he's still standing by and doing NOTHING while his allies try to get the ACA struck down in court \-- in the middle of a global pandemic!

Texans need a senator who will fight for our health care _all the time_ , not just pay lip service when it's politically convenient.
**[DONATE TO MJ HEGAR](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489002a/7f51f7bc/4e1ab50d/4ef69371/2622156367/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200528.1nd__1464__&amount=10")**
As a combat veteran and working mom who's faced the realities Texas families deal with every day, **MJ understands how important it is that EVERYONE is able to get the care they need, when they need it** \-- without breaking the bank.

That's why she'll fight to defend the progress we've made with the Affordable Care Act _and_ work to create a public health insurance option for anyone who wants it. But first she needs your help to win this race!

**The hypocrisy from Sen. Cornyn is astounding -- and it 's clear he needs to go. Will you pitch in to help MJ defeat him this November so she can fight for our health care in the Senate?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489002a/7f51f7bc/4e1ab50d/4ef69370/2622156367/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200528.1nd__1464__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489002a/7f51f7bc/4e1ab50d/4ef69377/2622156367/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200528.1nd__1464__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489002a/7f51f7bc/4e1ab50d/4ef69376/2622156367/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200528.1nd__1464__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489002a/7f51f7bc/4e1ab50d/4ef69375/2622156367/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200528.1nd__1464__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489002a/7f51f7bc/4e1ab50d/4ef69374/2622156367/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200528.1nd__1464__")**
\-- Team MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489002a/7f51f7bc/4e1ab50d/4ef69371/2622156367/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200528.1nd__1464__&amount=10")**

|

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489002a/7f51f7bc/4e1ab50d/4ef6936b/2622156367/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1464&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489002a/7f51f7bc/4e1ab50d/4ef6936a/2622156367/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Allen Chen
subject: this is what we’re up against
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
What we’re up against isn’t exactly a secret.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17659517/202026623/1700156400?refcode=em_fr_2020.05.28_AC_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWFmZTRiMi0wZGExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C6X26iGfj-3vkF4fUaMgZm753DjPrZw60_qAiJyXdKA=)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

subject: The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller: Chapter 8: Conclusion
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
This is our 8th and final installment of the Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller.
I hope by now, you have seen the way Lisa Scheller says one thing and acts the complete opposite way.
Whether it is raising taxes or voting to make Lehigh County a Sanctuary City or answering Gunther's questions about China, Lisa Scheller refuses to give a straight answer and tell the truth. This is why I am urging you to donate to my campaign today!
We cannot let another Establishment RINO get elected to office.
A donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 will help defeat Lisa Scheller's expensive D.C. consultants.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001al5WEtGT2T-Nzx_3G5fGz--I-J5eH48cMvcZnt82EqvKMHyN5VD8QTHZDnM7Ua_rXlzqpPrB8WRGgXqrbcCbIEY6z0200GpDbc2htubNcJMNFDb348y2SZhXf2wm4DK58pmHxCp2Q-XcZhl-MDgczwObcOtwJNOfCApijb8XWqajPHsrqBsx2A==&c=m5eVFFGHar7P8H7dLB4FB3vBoFw0af5wYm2OuFxWUy65MJMyTrP6Rg==&ch=QyKeg0BqCMWibEz7UGghtLWxe8O0UT1s_VVhMgH6I_8k-sui20-qhQ==)

By now, you have seen the unwavering difference in policy between Lying Lisa Scheller and me.
I will NOT be an apologist for communist China.
I will NOT vote to raise taxes. I will NOT vote in favor of Sanctuary Cities. I will NOT support ending the lives of the unborn. I will NOT support corporate values. I WILL FIGHT FOR CONSERVATIVE VALUES and STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP.
If you want a true conservative in office, I urge you to donate to my campaign right now. A donation of just $25 will help me fight for your best interests in Congress!
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001al5WEtGT2T-Nzx_3G5fGz--I-J5eH48cMvcZnt82EqvKMHyN5VD8QTHZDnM7Ua_rXlzqpPrB8WRGgXqrbcCbIEY6z0200GpDbc2htubNcJMNFDb348y2SZhXf2wm4DK58pmHxCp2Q-XcZhl-MDgczwObcOtwJNOfCApijb8XWqajPHsrqBsx2A==&c=m5eVFFGHar7P8H7dLB4FB3vBoFw0af5wYm2OuFxWUy65MJMyTrP6Rg==&ch=QyKeg0BqCMWibEz7UGghtLWxe8O0UT1s_VVhMgH6I_8k-sui20-qhQ==)

clean_body: We could lose our Senate Majority if we continue getting outraised by radical challengers - and this month will be close. Donate to protect President Trump's Senate Firewall before 11:59PM and your gift will be 5X-MATCHED!>> Friend, From my experience, I have learned the importance of keeping our eyes on the prize leading up to November: our Senate Majority Firewall. After falling behind the Democrats in Q1, Senate Republicans in critical battleground states need our help to ensure this month is different. The End of Month deadline is coming up. == I've asked Senate Republicans to let me reach out to their most dedicated supporters because I understand what all is at stake. We could lose our Senate Majority if we continue getting outraised by radical challengers - and this month will be close. == The fundraising numbers aren't the only numbers to pay attention to this year... Of the 23 Republican Senate seats up for grabs, Chuck Schumer and his cronies only need to flip 4 to seize total control of the Senate. That means the Liberal Establishment only needs to pull off a 17% success rate to end the America First Agenda as we know it. Will you step up and make an immediate contribution? == == == == == If I learned anything from my time serving this administration, it's that the mainstream media will try to control the narrative around the President and his Senate allies, regardless of the facts. name: Cory Gardner iPhone
subject: Americans can’t afford to back down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
Defending the Republican Senate Majority will be an uphill battle, but we have no other choice but to fight back and stop Schumer's plan for a hostile takeover this November. Will you stand with the entire Republican Senate Majority and me by rushing in a contribution before the May 31st Fundraising Deadline?
_Our 2014 victory here in Colorado was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Our win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats ' empty promises. And in the last six years, I've tirelessly fought to uplift my fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating.

And this year, I'm facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue._
---
**_Martha McSally. Joni Ernst. Donald Trump, Jr. Mitch McConnell._**
Friend,

Do you remember receiving emails from these leading conservative voices over the past month? If not, here are a few excerpts from their previous messages to you:
_"You see, Chuck Schumer knows just how important it is to win this battleground Senate race. It's so important to the far-Left to win that they've committed to spending tens of millions of dollars in Colorado." - Mitch McConnell

"Democrats across the country have been pouring money into crucial races in support of Chuck Schumer's handpicked candidates for U.S. Senate. Just last quarter, Democrats outraised key Republicans, showing the strength in Schumer's dark money machine." - Joni Ernst

"The fact of the matter is that the radical Left will not let up until their plans come to fruition. They want Battleground states like Colorado and Arizona flipped by leftist candidates - like failed presidential candidate John Hickenlooper - who will vote in lockstep with Schumer to further their radical agenda." - Martha McSally

"We must stay ahead. Cory's fight is far from over. Without your help, we could lose this seat, and possibly our Republican Senate Majority." - Donald Trump, Jr._
---
**Friend, the overarching idea here is obvious: defending the Republican Senate Majority will be an uphill battle, but we have no other choice but to fight back and stop Schumer's plan for a hostile takeover this November.**

name: Joni Ernst
subject: I'm sorry to do this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa
body:
Chuck Schumer's handpicked candidate has outraised us again. National Democrats poured over $1.5 MILLION into Iowa in just a matter of WEEKS!
I hate reaching out with news like this, but I've got no choice Friend.

Chuck Schumer's handpicked candidate has outraised us again. National Democrats poured over $1.5 MILLION into Iowa in just a matter of WEEKS!

Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi have put a big target on my back. They are sending every special interest group, liberal billionaire, and Democratic activist imaginable to support my opponent.

**Bottom line: Your help is needed if we 're going to fight back and protect the Majority.**

A first generation American who has experienced our broken political system firsthand, Michelle has pledged to vote against any new taxes, fight to lower taxes, and even returned over $400 million dollars to California taxpayers. In Congress she will continue to fight on behalf of hardworking Americans -- but right now, she needs our help.

There's too much on the line to sit back and let Nancy Pelosi buy this seat outright. So please, Friend, do your part to take back the House Majority. name: Amanda Makki
subject: #MakkiMomentum builds against Charlie Crist - Watch her interview on📺 Fox and Friends
body:
| [](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4cahl9gG8wcwvwb5AOD0qOz9Q9PsC5IvfzizdqBGKtOsCY&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fox_friends_interview&n=1) [](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=avQzzHJnGJZEKjm1xE1nNCQHG8zP5yhM6kvcwn6kz2DC03DGoD7-40mZeoAk_Ann&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fox_friends_interview&n=2)
* * *
**_Campaign Overview:_**
Amanda Makki has run an incredible campaign, with over 25 national, state and local endorsements and having raised over $740,000 with a burn rate of just 18 percent!

Amanda is also one of only 27 candidates in The United States to be named a Young Guns “Contender” and the only candidate in FL-13 to earn this distinction.

Amanda has over two dozen endorsements of conservative leaders at the national, state and local level, including some of President Trump’s closest allies in Congress.
* * *
* * *
[](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4cahl9gG8wcwvwb5AOD0qOz9Q9PsC5IvfzizdqBGKtOsCY&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fox_friends_interview&n=3)
### **Meet Amanda:**
Amanda Makki and her family escaped an oppressive religious regime persecuting Christians and Jews, and came to The United States legally in 1979. As a healthcare expert, and someone who managed a small business, Amanda is uniquely qualified for the challenges our nation is facing today with COVID-19 and the need to reboot our economy. Amanda worked in the Pentagon just weeks after 9/11 and served her country at the Department of the Army. Thereafter, Amanda advised Members of Congress on healthcare and veterans issues and in her last job, became a Partner at one of the largest law firms in the world before the age of 40.

Amanda has lived in Pinellas County since 2015 is an avid biker, golfer, and fisherman. She is devout in her Christian faith, and worships at Starkey Road Baptist Church. [](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4cahl9gG8wcwvwb5AOD0qOz9Q9PsC5IvfzizdqBGKtOsCY&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fox_friends_interview&n=4) _

Copyright © 2020 Amanda Makki for Congress, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Amanda Makki for Congress PO Box 47483 St Petersburg, FL 33743
---

name: Nikki Haley
subject: They have NO idea who they’re messing with
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc
body:
Democrats are scared and they SHOULD be.
Friend,

National Democrats, far-left activists, and powerful special interests from outside Arizona have united to defeat President Trump's Senate ally, **Martha McSally**. Attacks and negative ads are filling the airwaves in Arizona and millions are being raised every month by her liberal opponent. We are now coming up on the **End of Month deadline** and this is her chance to get ahead!

If Democrats turn Arizona blue, the Senate and White House could fall into Democrats' hands. [**Pitch in before midnight tonight to defend Arizona and the Senate >>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GindpTEOxwHc8HBihgJyCVTx2OVLPn0NextQWayap-9_iaQLEnNgbxQshHHK9eqOKXJnCekIwa2UzLyVJqVD9RN0Kqf5OPVCDJYi_ZZAaslDrsqCsYyDy2ZZXWk-A8t8oTlZaYkpyJ6G7MvGYGqPns-DCIGybyLAhAt1mxLcgQXyA2RcpUG4ZIAQWaObM1wQ8Zip6Va7l1KqBGD0Y7kipLIZlp0RENED-nfMI3iz_ijDISLpQuKa7vITz7CQBp8SC-4vmxblXlxyHYONSwLRWvURcqmDvbrLVWzL5S4jA55g7kPoxSIfJy_W_NF-JdPW1M99OmYI5eqLFydyyxqIuGuPBuIVBNkr_lqf_QqYPUU6g7OQihQSd7YVCORzuvvu-Y6Zj5zYmuXTwrM9gk8FcMzPbM6p8Nfs0J-rlsNS23Rw_J-tfnyasA==&c=WhDR5xRmU5TkNNWWiS4OR3cIyunH66RpGrvOK684HWHGx9NLTTI7Hw==&ch=0a02veJ3oSIJ4Z2lnFmLZMCOZIb3htYtdIFjZLgr8Yc2jNGeBr2TDg==)

**Martha is a fearless leader, fighter jet pilot, veteran and advocate for our men and women in uniform. When it comes to Martha McSally, the Democrats have NO idea who they 're messing with! Will you join me in standing with Martha today?**
[**STAND WITH MARTHA**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GindpTEOxwHc8HBihgJyCVTx2OVLPn0NextQWayap-9_iaQLEnNgbxQshHHK9eqOz-6dJWuvsoG1bDfhVtVPC_fNWLU2wFKpTu75NrNKTRTQUXfGJdKVv29dJyrIS7GToQoN8c1CYHXKO9vJCl0Y4wH2OhwE4-83wZ-p_X2uKhKfHPZ67QuNp0cIpJs4pSFB_KwmBCRRxwiSYeisxrFNUNbiyx39p73Sz4oNUs1rAK5_OdJUo5VnoCflQFGBno3r4mRXZRq-bk43gWf8HSMfSFMMlXBUxvEfxRhh5sWb58cN-POOXOloPD5psUr2oDnoO5Q7IPn9hnlurkBNlQEuZCXmWYGCEeHxdrQAFXqDvjbUTbCKb4eqqj_HpjssBDz2NKaEN9j2KGGawaoI7NiOy0drgvt_1eWaI9cBDt1F18kyZxMwjqIu3Q==&c=WhDR5xRmU5TkNNWWiS4OR3cIyunH66RpGrvOK684HWHGx9NLTTI7Hw==&ch=0a02veJ3oSIJ4Z2lnFmLZMCOZIb3htYtdIFjZLgr8Yc2jNGeBr2TDg==)

We can't let the Left drag Martha through the mud! She is the leader Arizona needs, not a rubberstamp for Chuck Schumer and his liberal agenda. Schumer and Senate Democrats have done nothing but obstruct, delay, and undermine our President - they've done NOTHING for the American people. Democrats are scared of Martha and they SHOULD be. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Why are US Taxpayers Funding a ‘Voice of the Mullahs’ in Iran?
body:
"As the US special representative for Iran, I receive complaints regularly about Voice of America’s Persian service." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2fd22a31fa&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Why are US Taxpayers Funding a ‘Voice of the Mullahs’ in Iran?**

“As the US special representative for Iran, I receive complaints regularly about Voice of America’s Persian service. Iranian viewers say its American taxpayer-funded programming often sounds more like the ‘Voice of the mullahs’ than the ‘Voice of America,’” US Special Representative for Iran Brian Hook writes in the _New York Post_.

“This is a priority for the Trump administration, because supporting the Iranian people includes giving them access to independent and truthful reporting.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d94b2dc651&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Exactly three months since President Trump tapped Vice President Mike Pence to head the White House Coronavirus Task Force, it is shifting focus to reopening the American economy,” Paul Bedard reports. Vice President Pence explained that America “will be ready this fall” for any potential second wave. Read more in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8b26dc4782&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “If states try now to implement an entirely vote-by-mail system and mail every voter on their outdated registration lists a ballot, they are inviting fraud into our elections. My message to Twitter: Before you decide to censor speech by throwing a label on the president of the United States–or any American–make sure you know the facts **yourself** ,” Rep. Rodney Davis (R-IL) writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9b81390e5b&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “As the world begins to recover from the pandemic, nations face a stark choice about what vision of artificial intelligence will prevail. As Group of Seven nations meet this year under the organization’s U.S. presidency, there is a critical opportunity to shape the evolution of AI in a way that respects fundamental rights and upholds our shared values,” U.S. Chief Technology Officer Michael Kratsios writes in [_**The Wall Street Journal**_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=29d55e3f6a&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=abfa4e437d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e3c5c683fc&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=14281815c9)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:

name: Sandy Smith
subject: RE: Tired of Socialists - I Name Names.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j20ugzaKnpNxmng&b=soM_inM4Ufva5YVH8NuraQ)
---
Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.**

I am a patriot who has had it with unconstitutional lockdown orders, given by liberal Trump-hating socialist Democrats who are trying to tank the economy to hurt the President politically.
_**Mean-spirited left-wing partisan hack governors have been punishing ordinary citizens all across the country, for the "crime" of trying to feed their families and avoid losing their businesses.**_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j20ugzaKnpNxmng&b=soM_inM4Ufva5YVH8NuraQ)
---

In Michigan, their Democrat Governor is persecuting small businesses like a 77-year old barber:

_State regulators on Wednesday suspended the license of a 77-year-old Michigan barber who insisted on cutting hair despite an order to stay closed during the coronavirus pandemic._

_Karl Manke has pledged to keep his shop open “until Jesus comes.” A judge declined the state’s request to shut down his shop Monday without first holding a hearing. Regulators took a different path by suspending his barber license and his shop license._

In Oregon, their governor sent Child Protective Services to harass a small business owner who tried to open in defiance of their Democrat governor's order:

_Oregon Occupational Safety and Health issued a $14,000 fine to Lindsey Graham, owner of Glamor Salon in Salem, for reopening her salon May 5 in defiance of Gov. Kate Brown's stay-home order._

_"I'm being threatened and intimidated and bullied daily by the government," Graham said during a press conference Friday. "I'm sad that I can drive 20 minutes down the freeway, and that person's job as a hairstylist is essential, according to Kate Brown. But my job, 20 minutes up the street, is nonessential."_

_"I don't want anyone to get sick. I know you guys don't want anyone to get sick," Graham said. "But I also don't want to go bankrupt and lose everything I worked for and neither do you."_

_She also claimed that Child Protective Services had visited her house and questioned her child. "I've never expected such a violent, aggressive, vindictive thing could ever be done to me or my family," she said, "because I'm trying to earn a living, because I'm trying to work."_

Here in North Carolina, we have another one of these abusive governors, Roy Cooper.

This guy is every bit the tinpot dictator that the governors of Michigan and Oregon are. You may recall that the Republican National Convention (which I will attend as a Trump delegate!) is in Charlotte, NC in August:

_President Donald Trump this week accused North Carolina Gov. Roy Cooper of “playing politics” with reopening the state, and said it would be “bad for them” if the state were to delay the start of the Republican National Convention in Charlotte.

“No, no,” Trump replied. “We’ll have a convention. I’m a traditionalist, but we’ll have to see, like everything else, but I think we’ll be in good shape by that time. We have a great state, North Carolina, that’s been very, very good._

_“Although, it’s got a Democrat governor, so we have to be a little bit careful.**It’s got a Democrat governor, so we have to be a little bit careful with that, because they’re playing politics.** They’re playing politics, as you know, by delaying the openings. ... To me that’s politics. They think it’s a bad thing for me if they delay the opening. I think it’s bad for them. And you have people protesting outside, and those people like Trump.”_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j20ugzaKnpNxmng&b=soM_inM4Ufva5YVH8NuraQ)
---

Our hyper-partisan governor would cancel the RNC if he thought he could get away with it. That's how these tyrannical Democrat governors roll. I have never met anyone so lost in what he is doing. A lost socialist is very very dangerous because you combine incompetence with bad left wing policy at the same time.

I've had it with these people. It is now abundantly clear that their motives were NEVER to keep anyone safe or healthy. It's to accumulate power for themselves, punish those who work for a living to support their families, and tank the economy for the election.

_**I am disgusted and shocked by their actions. No red-blooded American should ever stand for tyranny, and no one should stand for political-fueled retributions, either. **_

If you are proud of our president, as I am, **[I need YOUR help urgently](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j20ugzaKnpNxmng&b=soM_inM4Ufva5YVH8NuraQ) to defeat my high-level radical socialist Democrat opponent and retake this swing seat!**

Let's send a message to the Socialist NC governor. Let's show these tyrants that they can't get away with this.

I am proud of those who are standing to fight with me. I have already been endorsed by _Congressman Mark Walker, Congressman Ted Budd, and Congressman Mark Meadows_. Here is a picture of me and Mark Meadows. Congressman Meadows used to be Chairman of the Freedom Caucus, and now he is the President Trump’s Chief of Staff in the White House. He “proudly endorsed” me shortly before his promotion, which I was so honored!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j20ugzaKnpNxmng&b=soM_inM4Ufva5YVH8NuraQ)
---

President Trump has accomplished so much with constant pushback from the socialists, like these governors. _Imagine what he can do with a supportive Congress!_

**It is so crucial that we take advantage of every chance we have to flip a swing district** \- which North Carolina’s First District now is! They just redrew the map and took away a bunch of Democrat voters, making this district MUCH more competitive.

But this year, this district turned into a swing district. **Half of the district has never been represented by Butterfield**. They don’t know him, and they are Republicans!

[Will you help me beat Butterfield and deprive Nancy Pelosi of a reliable vote?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j20ugzaKnpNxmng&b=soM_inM4Ufva5YVH8NuraQ) I need you to send $15, $35, or $250 right now so that I can meet my goal by the end of this month. This deadline is so critical, and I have no time to lose.

**_I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!_**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j20ugzaKnpNxmng&b=soM_inM4Ufva5YVH8NuraQ), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you.

G.K. Butterfield is a leftist extremist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j20ugzaKnpNxmng&b=soM_inM4Ufva5YVH8NuraQ). I appreciate you and thank you.

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j20ugzaKnpNxmng&b=soM_inM4Ufva5YVH8NuraQ)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j20ugzaKnpNxmng&b=soM_inM4Ufva5YVH8NuraQ)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j20ugzaKnpNxmng&b=soM_inM4Ufva5YVH8NuraQ) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

Winterville NC 28590
USA

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Less than four weeks to go -- let’s make them count!
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cttl32L48K6i2e_CYMjoz8HqqdA3kzrE2qRklP9MoM8=/qctgf4Y2jS9vbj-CebntfslRIwsS3EOjfReWUu4HsXk=)

Peter,

The June democratic primaries are less than four weeks away, and with so much left to do between now and then, we're putting out a call to all of our supporters: **[Will you chip in today to give our team the grassroots boost we need to make this final month count?](https://act.myngp.com/el/cttl32L48K6i2e_CYMjoz8HqqdA3kzrE2qRklP9MoM8=/jbmvoPa3AYLYwphfg3SMNW53ZzZQsbvxv2qQ-iLXknw=)**
******[DONATE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/cttl32L48K6i2e_CYMjoz8HqqdA3kzrE2qRklP9MoM8=/jbmvoPa3AYLYwphfg3SMNW53ZzZQsbvxv2qQ-iLXknw=)******
If this were any other election season, we'd be spending these next couple of weeks going door-to-door and planning a massive, far-reaching Get Out the Vote effort to drive people to the polls on Primary Day. But this isn't your typical election -- and since more Democrats will be voting by mail than ever before, we need to start contacting voters early and often as they begin to receive their ballots. **[We can't rest until every single voter in our district knows who I am and what we stand for, so will you rush in a contribution today before our end-of-month deadline this Sunday at midnight?](https://act.myngp.com/el/cttl32L48K6i2e_CYMjoz8HqqdA3kzrE2qRklP9MoM8=/jbmvoPa3AYLYwphfg3SMNW53ZzZQsbvxv2qQ-iLXknw=)**

_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
******[Express Donate: $200](https://act.myngp.com/el/cttl32L48K6i2e_CYMjoz8HqqdA3kzrE2qRklP9MoM8=/jbmvoPa3AYLYwphfg3SMNW53ZzZQsbvxv2qQ-iLXknw=?express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=express_lane_200)******
******[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/cttl32L48K6i2e_CYMjoz8HqqdA3kzrE2qRklP9MoM8=/jbmvoPa3AYLYwphfg3SMNW53ZzZQsbvxv2qQ-iLXknw=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100)******
******[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/cttl32L48K6i2e_CYMjoz8HqqdA3kzrE2qRklP9MoM8=/jbmvoPa3AYLYwphfg3SMNW53ZzZQsbvxv2qQ-iLXknw=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50)******
******[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/cttl32L48K6i2e_CYMjoz8HqqdA3kzrE2qRklP9MoM8=/jbmvoPa3AYLYwphfg3SMNW53ZzZQsbvxv2qQ-iLXknw=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other)******

To be successful, we'll have to pull off the largest remote operation Brooklyn has ever seen. That means calls, texts, digital ads -- whatever it takes to show working families that a vote for me is a vote for bold ways, not old ways. We've come this far, but today, I'm asking for your help so we can go all the way: **[Can I count on you to donate $200, $100, $50, or whatever you can as we head into the final stretch?](https://act.myngp.com/el/cttl32L48K6i2e_CYMjoz8HqqdA3kzrE2qRklP9MoM8=/jbmvoPa3AYLYwphfg3SMNW53ZzZQsbvxv2qQ-iLXknw=)**

Best,
Adem

******[BECOME A VOLUNTEER](https://act.myngp.com/el/cttl32L48K6i2e_CYMjoz8HqqdA3kzrE2qRklP9MoM8=/P0CsJNvLT3WGx9D3hx3bgNTYf9IlEVI1CgNWFgr8EYw=)******

# Breaking: Supreme Court Ruling

The Montana Supreme Court just overruled a previous lower courts decision to allow post marked ballots that arrive after Election Day.

This means you need to send your ballot today or hand deliver to your county elections office as soon as possible.

If you're unsure how to do this check out the link below.

**Make sure your vote is counted!**

Send your Ballot today or hand deliver it tomorrow.

name: Charles Booker
subject: The only worry on my mind right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Time is running out but I know that if we fight hard these next couple of days we can finish in time.
#
I’m so proud of you and the movement we’ve built together:
* In the past weeks, we’ve received endorsements from folks in _every corner of Kentucky_ who agree that it’s time for real change.
* Polls are saying that our campaign is _neck-and-neck_ in the race right now with Mitch McConnell.
* Our new video ads have _millions of views_ and have helped sway a huge number of undecided voters.
* And our volunteer team says that we’ve been beating _record after record_ in our grassroots outreach.

Everything is falling into place. **The only worry on my mind right now is that our end-of-month fundraising deadline is quickly approaching, but we’re only half-way toward our $100,000 goal. **
**[It’s critical we raise $100,000 if we want to go all out these final three weeks and reach every last undecided voter before the election. Can you chip in to help us reach our goal? Giving even just $3 makes a huge difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17661882/202086127/984430230?refcode=em20200528-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzM0ZTIzYS0yNWExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EItiqSb-x4jws-ubw1nUjoQY_bDbJGQzCGM3AkvzGxQ=)**
**[Contribute $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17661883/202086128/984430230?refcode=em20200528-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzM0ZTIzYS0yNWExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EItiqSb-x4jws-ubw1nUjoQY_bDbJGQzCGM3AkvzGxQ=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17661884/202086129/984430230?refcode=em20200528-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzM0ZTIzYS0yNWExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EItiqSb-x4jws-ubw1nUjoQY_bDbJGQzCGM3AkvzGxQ=)
Time is running out but I know that if we fight hard these next couple of days we can finish in time.
Remember: we rely on grassroots donors and real people to fund this campaign. No corporate PACs or special interests are involved.
**It’s not the most popular choice or the easiest way to run a campaign.** But it’s the only way we’re going to run a campaign that’s free of the dark influences that control Mitch McConnell and corrupt our politics. It’s why we’re unafraid to fight for bold solutions like a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and a universal basic income.
I’m going to check in with my finance team later to see how much progress we’ve made with our fundraising, but I hope after reading this email you chip in however much you can spare.
**[Please make a donation today and support our campaign so we have the funds we need to win on June 23 and then go on to defeat Mitch McConnell. clean_body: Time is running out but I know that if we fight hard these next couple of days we can finish in time. I’m so proud of you and the movement we’ve built together: In the past weeks, we’ve received endorsements from folks in every corner of Kentucky who agree that it’s time for real change. Polls are saying that our campaign is neck-and-neck in the race right now with Mitch McConnell. Our new video ads have millions of views and have helped sway a huge number of undecided voters. And our volunteer team says that we’ve been beating record after record in our grassroots outreach. Everything is falling into place. The only worry on my mind right now is that our end-of-month fundraising deadline is quickly approaching, but we’re only half-way toward our $100,000 goal. = = = Time is running out but I know that if we fight hard these next couple of days we can finish in time. Remember: we rely on grassroots donors and real people to fund this campaign. No corporate PACs or special interests are involved. It’s not the most popular choice or the easiest way to run a campaign. But it’s the only way we’re going to run a campaign that’s free of the dark influences that control Mitch McConnell and corrupt our politics. It’s why we’re unafraid to fight for bold solutions like a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and a universal basic income. I’m going to check in with my finance team later to see how much progress we’ve made with our fundraising, but I hope after reading this email you chip in however much you can spare. = = If we keep working hard like this, I know in my heart this is the movement that’s going to defeat Mitch. — Charles **=** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: URGENT: Need your help to get doctors’ signatures!
body:
| |
---
I have a really important and urgent call to action for you. We need to get as many doctors to sign onto a letter to President Trump as possible. See below for information about how to sign it if you are a doctor yourself, or if you’re not a doctor, how you can ask your doctor (or any other doctors you know) to sign on.

|
---
**IF YOU ARE A DOCTOR**
If you’re a doctor, [read this letter to President Trump ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTQ5LTZmZDRjMTM4YTNiODRkNjI4YzRjYjlhOTA4M2RmNWQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvc2Vjb25kb3Bpbmlvbi1sZXR0ZXI_bWlkPTQyMDk4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=AyUqmLWkeY5Sk47dVqNyBA)about how our country needs a second opinion and how the so-called “experts” are not always right. Sign the letter by filling out the form at the bottom of the page. Please share this with other doctors you know as well.
[ READ AND SIGN THE LETTER ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTQ5LTZmZDRjMTM4YTNiODRkNjI4YzRjYjlhOTA4M2RmNWQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvc2Vjb25kb3Bpbmlvbi1sZXR0ZXI_bWlkPTQyMDk4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=B_Iz-33XVlxomcEDSqs0Cg)
|
---
**IF YOU ARE NOT A DOCTOR**
If you are not a doctor, but would like to ask doctors you know to sign the letter, we have an invitation to sign the letter and the text of the letter [posted online for you to use](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTQ5LTZmZDRjMTM4YTNiODRkNjI4YzRjYjlhOTA4M2RmNWQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvc2Vjb25kb3Bpbmlvbi1sZXR0ZXItcmVxdWVzdD9taWQ9NDIwOTgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=oRVt2SKnCh-WjrwCqfk7FQ).
[ VIEW THE REQUEST PAGE ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTQ5LTZmZDRjMTM4YTNiODRkNjI4YzRjYjlhOTA4M2RmNWQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvc2Vjb25kb3Bpbmlvbi1sZXR0ZXItcmVxdWVzdD9taWQ9NDIwOTgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=bdYowgpoyGbbVrfZtVNeMA)
|
---
We need signatures on the letter as quickly as possible, so if you are able, please complete this action right away!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
