name: Dick Durbin
subject: Asking for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
_We hope that you are keeping safe during this pandemic, Peter. We know this is a difficult time for many, so please only contribute if you are able to do so. We are more committed than ever to a Democratic victory in November and are grateful you 're in this fight._

Peter,
We already knew how important it was to take back the Senate and the White House this year, but the public health crisis our nation is facing today has made this fight even more urgent.
Right now, millions of Americans are unemployed. Small businesses across the country are struggling. Workers and families are worried about making rent and putting food on the table.
The Senate should be working to solve these problems and so many more during this crisis. But Majority Leader Mitch McConnell still doesn't feel "the sense of urgency" for additional relief.
**This unacceptable inaction from the Senate GOP has made it even more clear how important it is to elect a Democratic Senate this November. So here 's my request:**
**[We need to do everything we can to win control of the Senate -- including defending our seat here in Illinois. Will you pitch in $5 to my campaign before the May deadline?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-may-2020?refcode=em200527i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
This grassroots team is our secret weapon in the fight to take back the Senate this fall. With each contribution, no matter how big or small, we're building an even stronger movement -- and with your support, I am more confident than ever about our chances of a Democratic victory.
I am thankful for all that this team is doing during this time. You've always had my back -- so that's why I am asking you to show your support ahead of this critical May fundraising deadline.
**[Peter, will you contribute $5 right now to stand with me in the fight?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-may-2020?refcode=em200527i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-may-2020?refcode=em200527i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff40dc/42ab3cf4/60b298c1/135d2cfb/2127139107/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff40dc/42ab3cf4/60b298c1/135d2cfc/2127139107/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin
Attn: Online Department
101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: this is very concerning
body:
Friend, a couple of days ago, I got this very disturbing news article sent to me by someone on my father's re-election team, and I couldn't just passively see it and not act on it. [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018tEWEQ_x2z8LFFDqZItETbMksYrUxdRU3Tg34qqtWloQXi960rdjRD3xw-9cpd_DLbhdjDfy5oyudlXShFBtlg1_cEuHZ_sWGUE8dB74PrsXwSKbEMRV6QK5cW3GbMjSSzmfiMk7amRWCOmaCEKx9iGG6KT0gSzXA8kzwEhKYpfJoKZH9vyV2GL4wfM7TdmH6aXAZH9uOBzITeJfVpPhBLY926wn9lCFlyO0x9z2t_AlDgXU7-JvWulNbJgtPINjnZlbKKmUUH0MLg84f3PA0WUm7a8GCZ0LxScwJHEi8xmR535xF81QwfGw23eyHWVrFw3rwuJAE4e1V1n3NuMRNvQWjYOb5PBp&c=QKh0CNW6_wnH9m98AZUgR1v-h8bhL-7sHjjJ0uCmXiRr0PcUHodZcg==&ch=5RgTskzjjgPYB1QCFsMmwR8f4rbTvAUmpYvHvu1I_nWoy95pVGcznA==) The mainstream media is saying that this November's election in Texas could be the CLOSEST presidential race that the state has seen in YEARS.
If we didn't have fighters like Senator John Cornyn, the media may be right...
He's working day in and day out to defend my father from baseless attacks from the Far-Left, so I asked him if I could reach out to you to reinforce his efforts.
Friend, Sen. Cornyn just so happens to be in the middle of a MASSIVE End of Month deadline. He REALLY needs your help.
As we inch closer and closer to November, each End-of-Month deadline matters more and more, and without your support, the Senator won't be able to continue defending my father in the same way without the necessary resources. **May Fundraising Deadline** Goal status: **SHORT** [**CHIP IN $25**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018tEWEQ_x2z8LFFDqZItETbMksYrUxdRU3Tg34qqtWloQXi960rdjRJiE9iw8Ljla2vNDBJag3utM7sPskbxyX_9odLmXuZNmj4aYVJxBvppZfmPK44VSV94D10cEkLvoycAVllQb8Y09CMJB0nx4EY2uULVPWtK7RslXhQKtUA08wsbdc6SxvCTcs9K1Y3KqT-GH_nESiLXy7mRnWfesTztsq6tRV44cGA2xqfwu6zDLsN-l4bgn8X9QpNPd1_OzMIcl2wYLoqenmCfcdTiVkL4NLAW-cw2ygcP-MHELzMIPaKbV50WjF4f6OgHkeAdYXmaD4RngTu7001pevoybuP0EyDAHVjkP-moyF_K_RM08uyiWXHDmvw==&c=QKh0CNW6_wnH9m98AZUgR1v-h8bhL-7sHjjJ0uCmXiRr0PcUHodZcg==&ch=5RgTskzjjgPYB1QCFsMmwR8f4rbTvAUmpYvHvu1I_nWoy95pVGcznA==) Senator Cornyn plays a major part in our Republican-led Senate, and Friend, if he loses in November, I'm concerned that Texas will never again look the same.
I know you don't need things spelled out, but here are a few things that would take place if both my father and Senator Cornyn were to be voted out in November:
• Open borders. Open borders for ANYONE to cross into our nation, including those who are not authorized to be here.
• Taxes. Taxes. And more Taxes. At a time like this, the last thing our nation needs are more taxes, but Friend, that's what the Far-Left is hungry for!

• And one final thing to leave you with -- all of the work my father has done to nominate strong, conservative judges to the federal bench? All of that could be quickly overridden by Chuck Schumer and Sleepy Joe teaming up to nominate Far-Left, socialist, and anytime, anywhere, abortion-supporting judges.
We need your help during this End-of-Month goal, immediately, Friend. We need you to step up to the plate and show me, Senator Cornyn, my father, and all of Texas what we're made up of: We're strong Americans. We will stand strong for what we believe in. And we will not back down. If we didn't have fighters like Senator John Cornyn, the media may be right... He's working day in and day out to defend my father from baseless attacks from the Far-Left, so I asked him if I could reach out to you to reinforce his efforts. Friend, Sen. Cornyn just so happens to be in the middle of a MASSIVE End of Month deadline. He REALLY needs your help. As we inch closer and closer to November, each End-of-Month deadline matters more and more, and without your support, the Senator won't be able to continue defending my father in the same way without the necessary resources. With just three days until our next critical campaign deadline, we are still short of our goal. **We need to pick up the pace.**

We're facing a self-funded millionaire backed by Pelosi's deep pockets. They're willing to spend whatever it takes to hold on to this seat. To say it straight: _We 're going up against millions and the very best the Democrats have to offer. We will not win without your support._

[**Can we count on you to make a contribution of any size to get us to the finish line?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Mx7FhTi0r1kMrFrftk3wBa82pqdEjuFDXL6GxoApecN3XIBvu9h4kaVvhCzVtv0vo1KGGNLYOu1VizYfoWe9UPyEjAI-CEO-B0rk8pq0eUfElQRH6CEG-SWfEGZ8f2xtLZUPXyWhwvDMo9nzZBVfphIIfyl-3kBj33U5VZt70WEXx3VzuuZC6YHbtKjmFpGPs9ICAG4mONAVGQUYQzT53EdEbdKmjFhAQfJ4s5Inu50kpj2TyZ3KXpsa-DNT9otWFqOVaKoLLwyRjqfJcDAaou7bbF3S3TyMyu6X1-_SUx15HYW_g9vl_mhdwIU3KyQvn8CR7jbi1aKscrp1JTnvVzN1HDPR7V4f9MQ8E4bL2SDUnasp2z_BsUyb0XNiy2Jd&c=_dbiryV15SHVpWwO-c-skezJTklMEteU9yauBjNP_VD4mRWl-nBGEg==&ch=DDpK5H8wZHhFII3_k6qKk0seyEnWEz2V_6Ay5IMXwhZrzcZgDt3JjQ==)

Pelosi is organizing an all out attack against us because she knows we have what it takes to defeat her hand-picked opponent and take back the House. Now more than ever, our campaign is relying on people like you opening and reading emails like this to keep us in the fight. That's why any donation of any size is important. Even $1.

[_**Chip in $1 HERE! >>>**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Mx7FhTi0r1kMrFrftk3wBa82pqdEjuFDXL6GxoApecN3XIBvu9h4kdn9ccLqDhO13sX6hO9c5fCkqYJtMxW2XnV4SsvwbBSrYBAXMQZLE_Vq4nmfJ9TYmfM1CAfRSnlioCI79BdD1BnLI_yVyogNK8th3X1aGNSFfGiblNLoLmqlrVJnNqs-oIzf_dENrESjt4hQBuxTCBDiHhVtaKAkkew3YGp1SWwphP8CeoBNjxD2d3mKobtI65siCEOQ869ITCwX_ceJC6o1eiozAL02PADsUPMZOtB22DlAK9sbA-kOdZ45UjLehgOJh3nPC1eO5ic7oEG6DMwRebPKJXbryFBG9xHKidBC5wfC5HQKKWdYDrAU8xdld7U75Grsi-8x&c=_dbiryV15SHVpWwO-c-skezJTklMEteU9yauBjNP_VD4mRWl-nBGEg==&ch=DDpK5H8wZHhFII3_k6qKk0seyEnWEz2V_6Ay5IMXwhZrzcZgDt3JjQ==)

Young Kim is fighting for common-sense, conservative reforms - lower taxes, fewer regulations, and more economic opportunity for all Americans. But our agenda will fall flat without the widespread support of our grassroots team.

That would mean two more years of Nancy Pelosi, higher taxes, and a greater burden trying to make ends meet. It would spell disaster for small businesses struggling to navigate endless bureaucratic red tape. It would lead to fewer opportunities when hard working Americans need them most.

_But victory is within reach_. Against all odds, we WON our primary and we can win again in November. We just won't win alone. That's why we have to ask: [**ahead of Sunday 's critical campaign deadline, will you join our fight?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Mx7FhTi0r1kMrFrftk3wBa82pqdEjuFDXL6GxoApecN3XIBvu9h4kaVvhCzVtv0vo1KGGNLYOu1VizYfoWe9UPyEjAI-CEO-B0rk8pq0eUfElQRH6CEG-SWfEGZ8f2xtLZUPXyWhwvDMo9nzZBVfphIIfyl-3kBj33U5VZt70WEXx3VzuuZC6YHbtKjmFpGPs9ICAG4mONAVGQUYQzT53EdEbdKmjFhAQfJ4s5Inu50kpj2TyZ3KXpsa-DNT9otWFqOVaKoLLwyRjqfJcDAaou7bbF3S3TyMyu6X1-_SUx15HYW_g9vl_mhdwIU3KyQvn8CR7jbi1aKscrp1JTnvVzN1HDPR7V4f9MQ8E4bL2SDUnasp2z_BsUyb0XNiy2Jd&c=_dbiryV15SHVpWwO-c-skezJTklMEteU9yauBjNP_VD4mRWl-nBGEg==&ch=DDpK5H8wZHhFII3_k6qKk0seyEnWEz2V_6Ay5IMXwhZrzcZgDt3JjQ==)

**We only have three days left.**

Thank you,

Team Young

name: Mike Franken
subject: We're on the last leg
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
We're on the last leg of this primary campaign. And by George, things are heating up.
|
---
| |
---

| | Hello, shipmates -- we're on the last leg of this primary campaign. And by George, things are heating up. We've earned endorsements from major Pulitzer Prize-winning newspapers across the state: _The Des Moines Register_ and _The Storm Lake Times_. President Obama's Secretary of Defense, Chuck Hagel, endorsed our campaign as well. We've also seen support pour in from every single county in Iowa. Endorsements and letters to the editor populate every newspaper in the state, big or small. No other candidate can compete. Clearly, Iowa is ready for a change in leadership. We're ready to get the Senate working for us -- not for greedy special interests or their lobbyists. We have the momentum. The outside groups attacking us didn't slow us down; they only added coal to the furnace. I'm thankful that so many of you called out their attacks for what they are: an attempt to discredit me and my military service. [_**Now is the time to take further action. We need to raise another $138,000 before election day. Make a last-minute donation today, and help us win on June 2nd >>**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2566/33365068/4a7ada9e/3f8bcdf5/332614927/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200528_em_fr_deadline_all_l1") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Chip in $5 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2566/33365068/4a7ada9e/3f8bcdf6/332614927/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200528_em_fr_deadline_all_abx5")
---
[Chip in $10 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2566/33365068/4a7ada9e/3f8bcdf7/332614927/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200528_em_fr_deadline_all_abx10")

[Chip in $25 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2566/33365068/4a7ada9e/3f8bcdf0/332614927/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200528_em_fr_deadline_all_abx25")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: They're lying to you
body:
Expanded mail ballots, vote harvesting, killing voter ID, removing signature verification... this is not about public health. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/168197f1a275/theyre-lying-to-you?e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| | | [ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=f2fc475f2c&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| |
---
# **They are _LYING_ to you. **

Dear Friend -
You've never received an email like this from me. But seeing poll after poll showing that the majority of Americans are in favor of the massive expansion of mail-in ballots, it has to be said ...

They are **_LYING_** to you.

BIDEN. PELOSI. OBAMA. CLINTON. SCHIFF. CLAPPER. BRENNAN. ELIAS...

All of them.

They lied about _**IRS TARGETING.**_

They lied about _**SPYING**_.

They lied about _**RUSSIA**_.

They lied about _**FISA**_.

Now, using the fog of COVID, they are lying about the "convenience and safety" of their _**MAIL BALLOT SCHEMES. **_ Make no mistake, this strategy has been well crafted and long-planned. They know full well that making radical changes to election processes could crater November's elections.
These politicos and power brokers look down at us from behind their podiums and issue edicts that are breaking the backs of millions of small businesses and families across the nation. Even as the “curve has flattened” they have continued to encroach.
Consider all we’ve been put through. Consider all that’s been exposed.
Then ask yourself- do you really believe power-drunk bureaucrats are creating new election laws to make it easier for you to vote them out of office?
No. They are engineering chaos to control outcomes. Just like we’ve seen them do with COVID.
**_True the Vote_ is fighting back. **

We must not give in to fear-mongering bureaucrats who are forcing statewide mail ballots. What they are NOT telling the public is that along with maximizing mail-in ballots, they are also pushing to eliminate protections such as VOTER ID and signature verification, mailing ballots to both active and inactive voters using inaccurate, bloated voter rolls, and to top it all off, allowing "community vote harvesters" to retrieve and submit unlimited numbers of ballots!
We must hold the line!! Our Constitutional rights are being stolen. The most immediate and impactful action we can take is to sue. **We won in New Mexico and are currently suing in the states of Nevada and Virginia. This is only the first wave of the fight - but we must act now! **
Mandatory mail ballots, vote harvesting, killing voter ID, removing signature verification..... this is not about public health. **This is what happens when Government Takes Over. **
Over the coming weeks, we will be filing lawsuits on behalf of voters in many more states - and we are prepared to take cases all the way to the US Supreme Court if necessary.
Make no mistake, these are not “single state battles” and this is not about the primaries. More than 100 leftist lawsuits and executive fiats are in play right now - and they will change elections _**FOREVER**_. Every time a precedent is set in one state it threatens every state. We MUST stick together - and we MUST fight back.
Think it's not that bad? Think I'm exaggerating? [Read the latest COVID-stimulus bill put forward by Nancy Pelosi. ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=a7b28c78f0&e=ad8cba7e98)They want full control of elections! And they are very close to doing it.

**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH**!

[**_Please help us fight for voters in courtroom battles across America_! **](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=7a09e2a7fe&e=ad8cba7e98)

| [DONATE NOW TO STOP MAIL-BALLOT SCHEMES](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=42adf4c071&e=ad8cba7e98 "DONATE NOW TO STOP MAIL-BALLOT SCHEMES")
---
| In the days ahead we will turn our attention back to training and mobilizing volunteers for the general election, but right now _**WE MUST FIGHT BACK IN COURT**_ or free and fair elections will become a thing of the past.

[**_Please help us by contributing NOW_! **](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=77c8883d96&e=ad8cba7e98)

Onward,

Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder
True the Vote
**PS** Together we can stop their takeover schemes. [If everyone reading this chipped in $50 - and then asked their friends to do the same - and kept it going - by this time next week we could file suit in 4 more states and 8 more the week after. ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=2378088abd&e=ad8cba7e98) Our attorney won Bush v Gore in SCOTUS. He knows the terrain, but this is a very short runway. We must raise money for the fight **right now**. There is not a day to waste. Do not read this and think it doesn’t apply to you. This effects every American. Get some skin in the game and help fight back.
**PPS - NEXT STEPS** [**1.Donate now **](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=21e5eb920e&e=ad8cba7e98) **2\. Forward this to 5 friends ** **3\. Add a comment and declare You’re In the Fight! ** We can do this if we stick together. We can win. But only if we stick together.
---
| **Please follow us on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram!**
---
| | | | | | [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=9c4fb58f6d&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| | [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=ace296c6ae&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| | [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=be0c3cf833&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
|
---
| | | _Copyright © 2020 True the Vote, All rights reserved._
You signed up for this e-mail on our website at www.truethevote.org

**Our mailing address is:**
True the VotePO Box 3109 #19128Houston, TX 77253-3109
[Add us to your address book](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=65fa0bffcb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=65fa0bffcb&e=ad8cba7e98) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=65fa0bffcb&e=ad8cba7e98&c=7a08182cc1).

name: Our Revolution
subject: we are demanding health care for all
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| At this moment of national crisis, Our Revolution is doing the necessary work to demand health care for all and economic justice for our most vulnerable neighbors.

**The corporate establishment is united against us -- which is why House Democratic leadership opposes Medicare for All and instead is pushing to expand expensive COBRA coverage.**

While establishment Democratic groups remain silent, Our Revolution is fighting to build enough grassroots pressure to force Joe Biden and Democratic leadership to embrace the idea that nobody should die because they can't afford health coverage.

When the Party establishment tries to undermine progressive challengers who support Medicare for All -- like **Marie Newman** -- Our Revolution doesn't hesitate to fight against the DCCC and its undemocratic blacklist.

Not only are we taking on the DCCC directly; we're also empowering our local chapters to do the deep grassroots organizing essential to elect more **" Medicare for All" champions** to serve in Congress -- including **Mike Siegel** (TX-10), **Samelys Lopez** (NY-15), and **Georgette Gomez**(CA-53).

And with over 600 active groups and a willingness to speak hard truths, we're already mobilizing DNC delegates to ensure that we have the support to win a**progressive Democratic Party platform** at the convention.

It's going to take all of us coming together to stand up for the tens of millions of Americans who have lost their jobs and their health care -- and it's not a fight we can afford to lose.

[**_Every dollar that you donate to Our Revolution supports our crucial work empowering the grassroots to organize effectively and demand justice for working Americans. Donate now to help us expand our digital organizing campaign to demand economic and health care justice for all!_**](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_0520?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=27&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=7+-+Every+dollar+that+you+donate+to+Our+Revo&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_24MO_200528_1_1&source=OR_EM_FR_24MO_200528_1_1")

When we fight -- we win!

The whole team at Our Revolution

* * *

name: Corky Messner
subject: Double your impact – time is running out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
I want to show my commitment to getting Jeanne Shaheen out of office, so I’m personally matching donations. Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/6fee364e94e90aab/817a899d002ae8b7c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, If the last two months have shown us anything, it’s that Jeanne Shaheen isn’t looking out for the citizens and small businesses of New Hampshire, even though they are the lifeblood of our economy.

First the liberals delayed passing the CARES Act, then they refused to provide critical funds to small businesses that needed it most. And now Jeanne Shaheen is planning to back a bill stuffed with pork for her liberal agenda! **[Will you donate $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, or what you can now to help me get Nancy Pelosi’s friend Jeanne Shaheen out of office?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/6fee364e94e90aab/8d51197e4c688ef6c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** I want to show you how committed I am to this fight. **We have a fundraising goal of $25,000 for the end of May, and I want to personally match that with my own money**. I want to invest in the future of New Hampshire and America, and clear out career politicians like Jeanne Shaheen hiding in the fog of Washington. Now is not the time to delay. Time matters in a crisis! Will you double your impact by donating today? Help me hit our goal of raising $25,000, and I will match it with my own money. Shaheen claims she is fighting for the people of New Hampshire, but she has shown again and again that she lacks the courage to go against her liberal Senate buddies. When will people have enough of her political jujitsu? **Please double your impact by donating today. We need to get ahead in this fight to preserve American liberty**. **[Contribute $5>>> Make a $10 Impact](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/6fee364e94e90aab/84c2f22b65e08c81c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **
**[Contribute $25>>> Make a $50 Impact](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/6fee364e94e90aab/4e362a21ca192b48c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **
**[Contribute $50>>> Make a $100 Impact](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/6fee364e94e90aab/65fa659e2c1d3f46c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **
**[Contribute $100>>> Make a $200 Impact](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/6fee364e94e90aab/1f74e670acf99827c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **
**[Contribute $250>>> Make a $500 Impact](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/6fee364e94e90aab/df620c4d956b0b5bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** This is a great opportunity to make the most of your support. Don’t miss this chance! Thanks for your help! -Corky | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/6fee364e94e90aab/a179cedda1b58a98c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/6fee364e94e90aab/60f925b7eca80c54c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: Michelle De La Isla
subject: It's official
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
This race is just getting started. Now, more than ever your support will make a difference. \-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends,

Yesterday, **I officially filed to be on the ballot for Kansas' 2nd District race!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17664282/202131278/-2120508223?gpsid=8_122_13175&refcode=em20_200528_eom1_fnd_gq_ful__mdli_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200528_eom1_fnd_gq_ful__mdli_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzc3NTlhNi0zOGExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hT4lidlc31ASSSHJ5DVHjB1_D-VKGhQG7zpDsYyvTvE=)
When we launched this campaign nearly five months ago, I could never have imagined the support I'd receive. People from every corner of the district have stepped up to join me in advocating for a better Kansas, and I am so grateful to have each and every one of you on this team.

This race is just getting started. Now, more than ever your support will make a difference. We need to reach voters from Marshall County all the way to Cherokee County. More support means we can talk to more voters, we need to use all of our resources to get the word out about our race!

**[Will you chip in before my end-of-month digital fundraising deadline to help ensure I have the resources necessary to flip this seat and go to Congress to fight for you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17664283/202131279/-2120508223?gpsid=8_122_13175&refcode=em20_200528_eom1_fnd_gq_ful__mdli_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200528_eom1_fnd_gq_ful__mdli_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzc3NTlhNi0zOGExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hT4lidlc31ASSSHJ5DVHjB1_D-VKGhQG7zpDsYyvTvE=)**

Friend, we've already accomplished so much together. Last quarter, grassroots supporters like you helped me not only outraise the incumbent -- but the entire GOP field combined! I know if we continue working together, we can win in November and bring real change to our district.

I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money because I want Kansans to know I’m fighting for them and will not be influenced by corporate support. If I’m going to have the resources it takes to win, I need you to give and to spread the word!

**[Chip in $10 or more before Sunday at midnight to help send me to Congress to advocate for all Kansans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17664284/202131280/-2120508223?gpsid=8_122_13175&refcode=em20_200528_eom1_fnd_gq_ful__mdli_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200528_eom1_fnd_gq_ful__mdli_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzc3NTlhNi0zOGExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hT4lidlc31ASSSHJ5DVHjB1_D-VKGhQG7zpDsYyvTvE=)**

Thanks,

Michelle

**Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can.**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17664285/202131281/-2120508223?gpsid=8_122_13175&refcode=em20_200528_eom1_fnd_gq_ful__mdli_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200528_eom1_fnd_gq_ful__mdli_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzc3NTlhNi0zOGExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hT4lidlc31ASSSHJ5DVHjB1_D-VKGhQG7zpDsYyvTvE=)

PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
Michelle for Kansas
PO Box 67101
Topeka, KS 66667

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ad31a2ff-fca0-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd/d37759a6-38a1-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzc3NTlhNi0zOGExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hT4lidlc31ASSSHJ5DVHjB1_D-VKGhQG7zpDsYyvTvE=&id=111940568).

subject: Biden’s Goal

name: Rob Portman
subject: Nancy Pelosi’s liberal wish list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Portman for Senate Committee | [Privacy Policy](http://www
body:
Peter -- While Americans around the country, and right here in Ohio, are worried about how to get their families and small businesses through the COVID-19 pandemic, it appears that Democrats in Congress are less concerned... Peter, it appears that the time for bipartisan action to help Americans has passed in the mind of Nancy Pelosi and radical House Democrats. I myself was baffled at the contents of their latest “relief package...” At a whopping 1,800 pages, you’ll be shocked at how little it actually does for our economy and for struggling families and businesses. In short, Pelosi and her liberal colleagues in the House want to spend trillions more on their special-interest priorities rather than focusing on helping get Americans back to work. I need you to join me in showing our strong opposition to what Pelosi’s House is doing. Will you chip in anything you can to get your name on the list of Patriots who OPPOSE the radical left? **[<<< CHIP IN $5 NOW >>>](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo5z_eEECPPFGFKquFCcy-1-kuV43MCQUYqJ6OslJXh8XaRghHs9JMIGSc1hvemnTLlP3VW4naqct2Aam8MxaURUZ3hCNekxJsDTtKFtRqBlWU_CqeK6lWNhpq0LFWFy1DvpOfGVLvgkN3bx5937TogqHT_tZGn5CXxOyKPM6FkoU4xPgiE_haZ9JfSl02JvmqkKf7NLjU0dhnD81V5vD6k&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200528_pelosi_portman&n=1)** **[<<< CHIP IN $20 NOW >>>](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo5z_eEECPPFGFKquFCcy-1-kuV43MCQUYqJ6OslJXh8PGhNoV_PbF30uEn9Yys9vLljwYGRisNx2JWeipopFDnf0OIDn4lHvVVOhwc0Pm3UILbQnpk5-DZx4R6Sovv9J9onLPYzco2lWzt5sJcgWPmw8mQKNCRXKlwMWRypXoFwDiQlHD28eFQKHyHK9rEx_uNJ8CZodqtwUwVASOaIvNI&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200528_pelosi_portman&n=2)** **[<<< CHIP IN $45 NOW >>>](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo5z_eEECPPFGFKquFCcy-1-kuV43MCQUYqJ6OslJXh8UWgTi8wzdNNvEp2sSSltOuxRT-dNWSzlUXz4_OhnwLgQMnoQShSEswkwI-S0iFFF1rgzETRsO_Mg6-gZ1uMvIoa3sa2o0JDBc6lYtOjFG5XSoRoyFdGoVpDL0BsIkxSGx5frIWQYe6OM_lIaOT0jebQ3H4kWi3vDOHmhYOrCxK0&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200528_pelosi_portman&n=3)** One thing is for sure, Peter... the Far-Left is not worried about saving small businesses. They’re not worried about getting us back to normal. Instead... ❌ Their “coronavirus response” would raise taxes on small businesses while giving tax breaks to largely benefit millionaires who live on the East and West Coasts. ❌ Their “coronavirus response” bill would give rebate checks to illegal immigrants, which Nancy Pelosi has even bragged about including! This bill is so radical, that there is no chance it could pass United States Senate or be signed into law by the president.What were they thinking? Peter, I know that you don’t fall in line with Pelosi’s radical thinking, but I want to be sure... **[Will you chip in anything you can to my fight, right now, to make sure that this kind of wasteful spending never sees the light of day, especially amid a worldwide pandemic?](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo5z_eEECPPFGFKquFCcy-0LAVXgfe8Qlaor75n1HZJmGTjvQZWGwcY5itjNLSmkcKi9ssvMjIUiEofm1qKfeVHC0y9rf8kIZg8_h5we7vp-rLFcDZf5ehHyx_jgFlmb-YYjOwlcYgjyBanp93jdjlk3JyfkkKW7XSk35D_pqBUo7Eq1aS_nEcIqaUTsXojoqA&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200528_pelosi_portman&n=4)** I need your voice here, Peter. **[I need you to stand with me!](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo5z_eEECPPFGFKquFCcy-0LAVXgfe8Qlaor75n1HZJmGTjvQZWGwcY5itjNLSmkcKi9ssvMjIUiEofm1qKfeVHC0y9rf8kIZg8_h5we7vp-rLFcDZf5ehHyx_jgFlmb-YYjOwlcYgjyBanp93jdjlk3JyfkkKW7XSk35D_pqBUo70ge9kG55gWZraAUpHjJRg&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200528_pelosi_portman&n=5)** –Rob Portman [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sYYV_ledEgoYeQO-o30kdJeTLiOkPFE0-_P396RlgQw&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200528_pelosi_portman&n=6)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tgt5i9qzFHm-zEGuH8vKJ58&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200528_pelosi_portman&n=7)[

name: Team Warner
subject: protect the ACA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | Derek --

In the midst of an unprecedented public health crisis, the Trump administration is pressing forward with their attempts to gut the Affordable Care Act. If they succeed, millions of Americans could lose their health care -- **and the administration has not put out any replacement plan for this critical legislation.**

There's no excuse for trying to dismantle the Affordable Care Act, especially right now. Even some of the President's closest advisors have said that a full repeal should not move forward during the coronavirus outbreak. Still, the Trump Administration is trying to **repeal _all_ ACA provisions, including protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions.**

**[Add your name to our petition and tell the Trump administration that repealing the ACA during a public health crisis is wrong.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d466/53d9897e/549109c2/1c88791b/4214715848/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-acalawsuit")**

**The need for broad access to quality, affordable health care has never been clearer.** We're facing unprecedented challenges to our health care system right now, and the administration should be strengthening it instead of attempting to take away health care access and undermining protections for those with pre-existing conditions.

**[Will you sign on to tell the Trump administration that the ACA should remain in place?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d466/53d9897e/549109c2/1c88791b/4214715848/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-acalawsuit")**

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d466/53d9897e/549109c2/1c88791a/4214715848/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200528_p_1_fl__592__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")**

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

body:
_Senator Todd Young is a fifth generation Hoosier whose commanding victory in 2016 led him to join the Senate Republican Majority.

Todd brings years of leadership experience from his background as a US Naval Academy graduate and a Marine. Todd's commitment to protecting conservative values and policies includes his fight for fiscal responsibility and America-first Foreign Affairs legislation. As a leading conservative voice in Washington, Todd simply wants to make government work better for his fellow Hoosiers and Americans nationwide.

This year, however, Todd's main priority is to defend Senate Republicans in battleground elections nationwide and he needs YOU to help him in this fight._

Friend,

clean_body: Senator Todd Young is a fifth generation Hoosier whose commanding victory in 2016 led him to join the Senate Republican Majority. Todd brings years of leadership experience from his background as a US Naval Academy graduate and a Marine. Todd's commitment to protecting conservative values and policies includes his fight for fiscal responsibility and America-first Foreign Affairs legislation. As a leading conservative voice in Washington, Todd simply wants to make government work better for his fellow Hoosiers and Americans nationwide. This year, however, Todd's main priority is to defend Senate Republicans in battleground elections nationwide and he needs YOU to help him in this fight. Friend, As a top GOP supporter, you've been invited to join the Republican Majority Protection Fund! This new platform will ensure that our critical fundraising deadlines are met with a strong response. REPUBLICAN MAJORITY PROTECTION FUND Your donation of $5, $10, or $25, will be processed once now, and once again at midnight on May 31st, giving our team an extra fundraising boost before the May Fundraising Deadline! == Todd is working to ensure that Chuck Schumer and the entire leftwing establishment in the Senate doesn't take a single battleground seat this year. But with National Democrats dumping millions of dollars in these races across the nation, our future is uncertain. == == == == == == And remember, pledging your support today for our movement keeps us ahead of our critical fundraising goals. Because without patriots like yourself, keeping up with the Democrats record-breaking fundraising numbers and defending critical Senate seats in Colorado, Arizona, Iowa, and North Carolina would be impossible. **== Thank you for your continued support of Senate Republicans, and their battle to deliver on President Trump's America-First agenda. ** PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TODD YOUNG, INC. | | Friends of Todd Young. | PO Box 3743, Carmel, IN 46082 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

**It 's no secret: Susan Collins has lost the trust of Maine voters. **Our recent polling has us neck-and-neck and her favorability is declining every day. _I 'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Mainers -- including those who have been ignored for way too long._
My message is resonating with voters and we need to make sure they hear it amidst Republican attacks and TV ad noise. _So, we 're expanding our digital, phone, and TV outreach so we can engage every single Maine voter -- but we're going to need your help to bring this race to the finish line._
Last month we outraised Susan Collins -- and I'm optimistic with you on my side we'll do it again! **Together we 'll send a message that our grassroots support is unstoppable and we WILL WIN this race, flipping the Senate in the process. [Can I count on you to help us hit our end-of-month goal by splitting a donation between VPP and my campaign today?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0468/72412298/4c963a5c/610554a9/807237129/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJnaWRlb25fc3BsaXRfbWF5IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6IlZQUF9FTV9GUl8yMDA1MjhfR2lkZW9uU3Vycl9VMV9YMSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjIwIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon_split_may?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200528_GideonSurr_U1_X1&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=10+-+Can+I+count+on+you+to+help+us+hit+our+en&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200528_GideonSurr_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200528_GideonSurr_U1_X1")**

Things have been looking pretty good for my campaign! We've been surging in the polls -- and we're mobilizing Mainers like never before. Enter Mitch McConnell -- who 'll stop at NOTHING to make sure I do not win this race. McConnell is scared of the momentum we 're seizing -- so, he's sending my state everything he's got (including millions of dark money dollars)! "" I'm bound to be hit by an onslaught of Republican attacks after this money floods Maine airwaves. Peter \-- we have to be prepared to respond or we risk losing our momentum going into the final months of this race. "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" It 's no secret: Susan Collins has lost the trust of Maine voters. Our recent polling has us neck-and-neck and her favorability is declining every day. I 'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Mainers -- including those who have been ignored for way too long. My message is resonating with voters and we need to make sure they hear it amidst Republican attacks and TV ad noise. So, we 're expanding our digital, phone, and TV outreach so we can engage every single Maine voter -- but we're going to need your help to bring this race to the finish line. Last month we outraised Susan Collins -- and I'm optimistic with you on my side we'll do it again! Together we 'll send a message that our grassroots support is unstoppable and we WILL WIN this race, flipping the Senate in the process. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kansans=20for=20LaTurner?=
subject: Secret Democrat fundraiser in Kansas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
We just found out about a secret fundraiser hosted by Kathleen Sebelius and Amy Klobuchar. Democrats are confirming what we've known all along. | |
---
| | | Patriot,

Last week [Elizabeth Warren endorsed our Democrat opponent](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f44954d38c&e=1050d051da). Now, we just found out about a secret fundraiser for her hosted by Kathleen Sebelius and Amy Klobuchar. National Democrats are confirming what we've known all along. **The Mayor of Topeka is the chosen candidate of the leftist Democrats and socialists in Washington D.C.** They will do everything they can to get her elected.

We need your help to make sure the Democrats don't take over another seat in Kansas. If De La Isla is somehow elected, she will undoubtedly be the most liberal Representative to ever be elected to Congress from this district. [Will you pitch in to help us Take Back the House from Nancy Pelosi?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=4f6069dbad&e=1050d051da)
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f4ec626ca4&e=1050d051da)
---
| Nancy Pelosi has already said [she's targeting the 2nd congressional district](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=3b82e184d6&e=1050d051da) because they believe they can pick up another seat in Kansas. Here's what they have already said about our current Congressman:
---
| | “Congressman Steve Watkins has spent his first year in office distracted by scandals. With a weak Republican incumbent who barely won in 2018, Kansas’ second district presents an opportunity for Democrats to build on the
historic gains we made last cycle.”
-Brooke Goren, Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC)
---
| **We need a Republican nominee who can win the general election, and Jake LaTurner is the man for the job. **

We don't need coastal liberals telling Kansans what to do. Jake LaTurner has a proven track record of leading on the issues that matter to Kansans. _**That’s why you see trusted groups like Kansas Farm Bureau endorse Jake, while Massachusetts liberals endorse our opponent.**_

Help us send a message to the Democrats that we won't stand for their crazy ideas here in Kansas by donating now. Anything helps: [$100, $50, or even $25.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=1b8a8bfb55&e=1050d051da)

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner
---
|
---

name: Colin Lauderdale, Campaign Manager
subject: Sorry to email so late, but I just heard an exciting update.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Here's what happened after our campaign volunteer Erika emailed you last night:
#
Sorry to email you so late. But I want to share with you an exciting update I just heard!
Our campaign volunteer Erika told me that after she emailed you about our Yard Sign Fund last night, donations came pouring in.
**Since last night, we were able to raise enough money to pay for 75% of our yard sign expenses. This is a big deal if we want to put up yard signs in every corner of Kentucky. **
**[We’re now just a couple more donations away from making sure we can give a yard sign to anyone who wants one. Can you chip in $3 or anything you can to our Yard Sign Fund?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17664908/202149416/984430231?refcode=em20200528-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGU3ZTM0NS00MWExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oSZIsykKh-lCgdUQXWRLWIny8aNCHD8MaNv7dbj2qhw=)**
**[Contribute $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17664909/202149417/984430231?refcode=em20200528-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGU3ZTM0NS00MWExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oSZIsykKh-lCgdUQXWRLWIny8aNCHD8MaNv7dbj2qhw=)**
I can’t emphasize enough how important yard signs are right now.
It might seem old-fashioned, but in this time of social distancing, yard signs are an effective way of showing our support for Charles Booker and getting more people interested in our movement.
Here’s the sign I have in my yard!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17664910/202149418/984430231?refcode=em20200528-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGU3ZTM0NS00MWExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oSZIsykKh-lCgdUQXWRLWIny8aNCHD8MaNv7dbj2qhw=)
Again, I know it’s late but if we can raise enough money tonight to pay for 100% of our yard signs that would be a huge help for our campaign.
**[So please chip in $3 or whatever you can tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17664911/202149419/984430231?refcode=em20200528-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGU3ZTM0NS00MWExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oSZIsykKh-lCgdUQXWRLWIny8aNCHD8MaNv7dbj2qhw=) **And in case you missed Erika’s email, I’m attaching her message below so you can read about the volunteer work she’s been doing and why yard signs are so important this election.
Thanks!
Colin, Campaign Manager

* * *
Hi, it’s nice to meet you. My name is Erika – I’m a volunteer for the Charles Booker campaign for U.S. Senate.
Now that the election is less than four weeks away, the volunteer team is working hard to make sure every undecided voter knows the name Charles Booker and learns about our bold, progressive movement.
Usually, we would be knocking on doors and talking to voters in-person about the election. But now with COVID-19, we need to be more creative in our voter outreach and focus on other ways to get our message out.
**So this week, we started printing and distributing our brand new yard signs!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17664912/202149420/984430231?refcode=em20200528-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGU3ZTM0NS00MWExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oSZIsykKh-lCgdUQXWRLWIny8aNCHD8MaNv7dbj2qhw=)
**[Will you chip in $3 to our Yard Sign Fund and help us safely deliver more yard signs for people so they can show their neighbors how big and strong our movement is? It’s more critical than ever we make our support visible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17664926/202149434/984430231?refcode=em20200528-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGU3ZTM0NS00MWExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oSZIsykKh-lCgdUQXWRLWIny8aNCHD8MaNv7dbj2qhw=)**
**[Contribute $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17664927/202149435/984430231?refcode=em20200528-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGU3ZTM0NS00MWExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oSZIsykKh-lCgdUQXWRLWIny8aNCHD8MaNv7dbj2qhw=)**
So far, we’ve invested nearly $3,000 in printing yard signs.
The response has been great. Supporters have been so excited to post their yard signs in their community and spread the word about our movement.
**Especially in a competitive primary like this, every yard sign counts if it means one more person googling “Who is Charles Booker?” and deciding to vote for us. **
**[We plan on investing another $1,000 in printing out more yard signs, but we need your help to cover the cost. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17664928/202149436/984430231?refcode=em20200528-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGU3ZTM0NS00MWExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oSZIsykKh-lCgdUQXWRLWIny8aNCHD8MaNv7dbj2qhw=)[Can you chip in anything you can to help pay for our yard signs? There’s no such thing as a small donation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17664929/202149437/984430231?refcode=em20200528-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGU3ZTM0NS00MWExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oSZIsykKh-lCgdUQXWRLWIny8aNCHD8MaNv7dbj2qhw=)**
**[Contribute $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17664930/202149438/984430231?refcode=em20200528-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGU3ZTM0NS00MWExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oSZIsykKh-lCgdUQXWRLWIny8aNCHD8MaNv7dbj2qhw=)**
Thanks for the help,
Erika
P.S. clean_body: Here's what happened after our campaign volunteer Erika emailed you last night: Sorry to email you so late. But I want to share with you an exciting update I just heard! Our campaign volunteer Erika told me that after she emailed you about our Yard Sign Fund last night, donations came pouring in. Since last night, we were able to raise enough money to pay for 75% of our yard sign expenses. This is a big deal if we want to put up yard signs in every corner of Kentucky. = = I can’t emphasize enough how important yard signs are right now. It might seem old-fashioned, but in this time of social distancing, yard signs are an effective way of showing our support for Charles Booker and getting more people interested in our movement. Here’s the sign I have in my yard! = Again, I know it’s late but if we can raise enough money tonight to pay for 100% of our yard signs that would be a huge help for our campaign. = And in case you missed Erika’s email, I’m attaching her message below so you can read about the volunteer work she’s been doing and why yard signs are so important this election. Thanks! Colin, Campaign Manager Hi, it’s nice to meet you. My name is Erika – I’m a volunteer for the Charles Booker campaign for U.S. Senate. Now that the election is less than four weeks away, the volunteer team is working hard to make sure every undecided voter knows the name Charles Booker and learns about our bold, progressive movement. Usually, we would be knocking on doors and talking to voters in-person about the election. But now with COVID-19, we need to be more creative in our voter outreach and focus on other ways to get our message out. So this week, we started printing and distributing our brand new yard signs! = = = So far, we’ve invested nearly $3,000 in printing yard signs. The response has been great. Supporters have been so excited to post their yard signs in their community and spread the word about our movement. Especially in a competitive primary like this, every yard sign counts if it means one more person googling “Who is Charles Booker?” and deciding to vote for us. = = Thanks for the help, Erika P.S. If you want your own yard sign, =** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: Twitter is Silencing Trump and Conservatives
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rYAv1dhnl9lFhqWNJ-F0GESV9bN9VsaFiUlanlifpNxGZyouiGgfw3REXGK0WZ4rj3sYcdZOfRHvxTK4uObps748ZG59fbvCJUNk8VczJFKfIx34WSDHo3UAJi5SKS5-jmxEipfQnCTUAvgFS0NdMZu7gW52CidKh_RS376_1wg=&c=ZUiAPNWlQW7TzOfeePKcESVwkgwJ-9lOPNEkZQqiQKEh4s0KbPCx9A==&ch=mpZ70Ciww4Crw5wvneP7ck-gbMNIwMcZ_OwnvFW_6sPJQ0ttBv5OCg==)
---
| Patriot,
It's no secret that the "Big Tech" companies like Twitter, Facebook, and Google are run by far-left activists who have silenced conservative voices in the past. Now, Twitter has been "fact-checking" President Trump's tweets while fake news gets posted almost daily by left-wing journalists.
If Big Tech is going to regulate content on their platforms, then they don't deserve immunity from lawsuits.
I am introducing a bill that strips liability protection from social media companies such as Twitter and Facebook. If they are going to regulate speech on their platforms, then they don't deserve the immunity they currently enjoy.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rYAv1dhnl9lFhqWNJ-F0GESV9bN9VsaFiUlanlifpNxGZyouiGgfw3REXGK0WZ4rj3sYcdZOfRHvxTK4uObps748ZG59fbvCJUNk8VczJFKfIx34WSDHo3UAJi5SKS5-jmxEipfQnCTUAvgFS0NdMZu7gW52CidKh_RS376_1wg=&c=ZUiAPNWlQW7TzOfeePKcESVwkgwJ-9lOPNEkZQqiQKEh4s0KbPCx9A==&ch=mpZ70Ciww4Crw5wvneP7ck-gbMNIwMcZ_OwnvFW_6sPJQ0ttBv5OCg==)

| | | [SIGN THE PETITION](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rYAv1dhnl9lFhqWNJ-F0GESV9bN9VsaFiUlanlifpNxGZyouiGgfw3REXGK0WZ4rj3sYcdZOfRHvxTK4uObps748ZG59fbvCJUNk8VczJFKfIx34WSDHo3UAJi5SKS5-jmxEipfQnCTUAvgFS0NdMZu7gW52CidKh_RS376_1wg=&c=ZUiAPNWlQW7TzOfeePKcESVwkgwJ-9lOPNEkZQqiQKEh4s0KbPCx9A==&ch=mpZ70Ciww4Crw5wvneP7ck-gbMNIwMcZ_OwnvFW_6sPJQ0ttBv5OCg==)

body:
National donors are flooding donations into my opponent’s war chest in hopes of flipping Texas' legislature blue. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/turning-texas-blue-5-28-2020?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=d293da08a6&e=4f010155df)
---
| | Friends,

I just got an urgent update from my team – National donors are flooding donations into my opponent’s war chest in hopes of flipping Texas' legislature blue:
---
|
---
| Their attentions are turned to our state because they know that what happens in Texas will determine who controls the legislature and redistricting moving forward. The Democrats are just 9 seats away from taking over the Majority.

To make matters worse, we are behind on our May goal. Reaching every goal between now and November is critical. I’m worried that if we don’t close the gap, the future of our state and country could take a turn for the worse. I am counting on you – [please rush an emergency contribution before it’s too late!](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=97094215dd&e=4f010155df)
---
| [>> DONATE >>](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=7b2e7accb1&e=4f010155df ">> DONATE >>")
---
| National interest groups are going to do whatever it takes to win. Thanks to the Democratic Machine, they have hundreds of millions at their disposal and friends in the liberal media to help spin this election in their favor. Missing our goal gives the Left momentum, and with less than 6 months left until Election Day, we cannot afford to fall short.

Send a message to the liberal establishment and far-left Democrats. Don’t let them turn Texas blue! [Please make an immediate donation and help us fight back >>](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=1fcc5dcc60&e=4f010155df)

For Texas,

|

| Will Douglas
Republican Nominee for Texas House District 113

name: polling@bollierforkansas.com
subject: NEW POLL ALERT: 44-43
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bollier for Kansas
body:
A new internal Republican poll just leaked -- and it shows a one-point race between Barbara and our likely Republican opponent Kris Kobach. That’s a virtual tie!

|
---

| | **NEW KS-SEN POLL: 44-43** Team, A new internal Republican poll just leaked -- and it shows a one-point race between Barbara and our likely Republican opponent Kris Kobach. That’s a _**virtual tie**_! Today’s new poll is proof we can win this race. But it’s going to take all of us fighting our hardest and with a big fundraising deadline coming up this weekend, Barbara needs your support right away. [**Can you chip in $5 right now to meet our May goals and keep up the momentum to flip Kansas?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17665040/202152124/-1877084089?refcode=em200528i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmZkNWIyNi00MmExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4AusJnw5BurMmkwYB0D7t_l08U8UQqK-HXHuKpC9j9I=) It’s pretty incredible what’s happening in Kansas, team. We have a chance to make history this year by electing a Democrat and the first-ever woman physician to the U.S. Senate. body:
We have few words to express our sorrow and outrage about the murder of George Floyd in Minneapolis. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/outvote/may-28-2020?e=0aad15100c)

**This Week in Democracy: **

We have few words to express our sorrow and outrage about the murder of George Floyd in Minneapolis.

If you identify as white, please consider engaging with [these anti-racism resources](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=6ef2b2ed65&e=0aad15100c).

_5.26.20 | ACLU_ Discover the history of the reparations movement and why activists are optimistic about achieving success.

[ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=ca82a74340&e=0aad15100c)
---

_8.13.17 | Equality Includes You_ 75 ways for white people to engage in anti-racism.

|
---
|
---
|
**What You Can Do: **

---
| | [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=6e7c28b33a&e=0aad15100c)
---
Demand #JusticeforFloyd by adding your name to [Color of Change's petition](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=34bea5c99f&e=0aad15100c) advocating for charging the officers with murder.

To support long-term change and healing, donate to [Black Lives Matter](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=140f85082f&e=0aad15100c) or the [ACLU](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=077ca84616&e=0aad15100c).

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17665417/202161942/721416609?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTYzMDliZS00N2ExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AiOQoMabZ5Qw3O0ayWEwMVFS2xSTfP8s2Kv_TxKOFok=)
| | Friends, it’s critical that we beat Donald Trump in November – _but we can’t stop there._

We also must take back the Senate and stop Mitch McConnell from blocking the progress our country needs.

[We have an incredible opportunity to flip Arizona blue by electing former Navy combat pilot, engineer, and NASA astronaut Mark Kelly to the U.S. Senate. He’s running against Martha McSally, who serves as a rubber stamp for McConnell and Trump.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17665418/202161943/2124660968?refcode=EM_FR_B1_052820_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTYzMDliZS00N2ExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AiOQoMabZ5Qw3O0ayWEwMVFS2xSTfP8s2Kv_TxKOFok=)

[Mark Kelly set a goal of reaching 50,000 grassroots donations by midnight on Sunday to flip Arizona and take back the Senate. And he’s not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you chip in now to help get him across the finish line?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17665419/202161944/2124660968?refcode=EM_FR_B1_052820_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTYzMDliZS00N2ExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AiOQoMabZ5Qw3O0ayWEwMVFS2xSTfP8s2Kv_TxKOFok=)
---
| | [CHIP IN TO HELP FLIP THE SENATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17665420/202161945/2124660968?refcode=EM_FR_B1_052820_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTYzMDliZS00N2ExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AiOQoMabZ5Qw3O0ayWEwMVFS2xSTfP8s2Kv_TxKOFok=)
---
Many of you know Mark’s wife, former U.S. Representative Gabby Giffords. In 2011, Gabby was shot and nearly killed at a “Congress on Your Corner” event in Tucson, Arizona. Over the course of her long recovery, Mark supported her every step of the journey, facing challenges unthinkable to most of us with unwavering strength and grace.

[Since 2011, I’ve watched Mark and Gabby fight for common-sense gun reform, taking on the NRA and helping elect responsible Democrats dedicated to ending gun violence across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17665421/202161946/2124660968?refcode=EM_FR_B1_052820_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTYzMDliZS00N2ExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AiOQoMabZ5Qw3O0ayWEwMVFS2xSTfP8s2Kv_TxKOFok=)

Mark is running against Martha McSally – a Trump loyalist who cares more about blindly following the president than helping families and workers in Arizona.

[Recent polls show Kelly leading McSally – but it’s going to be a close race. Just like here in Colorado, Mitch McConnell is using outside money to prop up vulnerable Republicans. McConnell and his allies have pledged to spend nearly $15 million on ads to attack Kelly and boost McSally. We have to fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17665422/202161947/2124660968?refcode=EM_FR_B1_052820_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTYzMDliZS00N2ExLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AiOQoMabZ5Qw3O0ayWEwMVFS2xSTfP8s2Kv_TxKOFok=)

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Peter, I need you on this one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890034/7f51f7bc/4e1f853d/4ef69551/1712913633/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter:

After nearly two decades in Washington, one thing is plain to see -- you can trust Senator John Cornyn to side with the pharmaceutical companies and the insurance industry over his constituents.

I will always side with Texans. **That 's why I'm running against Sen. Cornyn.** In the Senate, I'll protect our health care and fight for a public option so EVERYONE can get the health care they need.

**Will you stand with me in this fight for our health care by contributing today?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890034/7f51f7bc/4e1f853d/4ef69550/1712913633/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200528.2nd__1472__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890034/7f51f7bc/4e1f853d/4ef69557/1712913633/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200528.2nd__1472__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890034/7f51f7bc/4e1f853d/4ef69556/1712913633/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200528.2nd__1472__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890034/7f51f7bc/4e1f853d/4ef69555/1712913633/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200528.2nd__1472__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890034/7f51f7bc/4e1f853d/4ef69554/1712913633/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200528.2nd__1472__")**
**While Senator Cornyn spends a lot of time _talking_ about wanting to reduce the cost of prescription drugs, his _actions_ paint a completely different picture.** He took hundreds of thousands of dollars from Big Pharma and then voted against a bipartisan bill that would have lowered the cost of prescription drugs, but could have hurt his donors' profits.
Senator Cornyn has worked hand-in-hand with Mitch McConnell to:
1. Gut protections for _millions_ of Texans with pre-existing conditions
2. Allow insurance companies to charge older Texans _more_ for coverage

---
**[If you think it's time that Texans have a senator who will defend their health care and work to improve it (not tear it down), donate to my campaign today.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890034/7f51f7bc/4e1f853d/4ef6954b/1712913633/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200528.2nd__1472__&amount=10")**

Senator Cornyn is just another politician in the pockets of corporate PACs. He's forgotten who he was elected to serve: the people of Texas.

I know Texans aren't afraid to fight for what we believe in. I don't believe in backing down from tough fights -- but I need you on this one, Peter.

**[Join my team today by making a quick donation. Help me defend our health care.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890034/7f51f7bc/4e1f853d/4ef6954b/1712913633/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200528.2nd__1472__&amount=10")**

Thanks,
MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890034/7f51f7bc/4e1f853d/4ef6954b/1712913633/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200528.2nd__1472__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890034/7f51f7bc/4e1f853d/4ef6954a/1712913633/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1472&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890034/7f51f7bc/4e1f853d/4ef69549/1712913633/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Indiana’s playbook
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
As Governor Holcomb said yesterday, #INThisTogether isn’t just a slogan – it’s how Hoosiers approach our team effort to getting back on track. | | |
---|---|---
Friends,

_**“The words ‘In This Together’ aren't rhetorical – this is a playbook.” – Gov. Holcomb**_

We’re now almost a week into **[Phase 3 of Indiana’s Back on Track plan](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d94395e4726e4b41b711c3a07ed349b0&_e=mXOIxJv037Ud5RzCDNpBYiWlauDqs5svnOptAfF63iN18SOWTKkVKJHdmuE7gt7txhpiTUt2juIuecXf_4P-LvEBdMeKTVoPHLUc1l5rt_VXZGnp50bQI_Nu8yCyaUh4i5CQUNVUyGIfH--ZglAU_yqfcOlINwQOrqE4zqZukiS-S-B2-I6zC4NJt3nDce2uBZY7slLXLxpOQzkn5KU1F963dB7k94w990VTXvID8fq-EYKt1UHxWyG1cbPu3kiO1x7bEkNKfAvk95HG-OMWcL_fpGJU4k2y4Amqgh57NZJhOXp-m9Mbbw7NbKpxLkmvNt3G3nYcu_t90AsHU-W8XGrHYPluyja2kg-gexwHNuo-IpKXmjm0-FUbFL69CZX8T8TBEWw-lIKIii216HLlLfE3LxeOe-z44OmTyy_TE9Tkj5JUxK9MF4juqsql9NzE)** – it’s a step-by-step playbook to Indiana’s safe and steady reopening.

But it’s not the only playbook. _**As Governor Holcomb said yesterday, #INThisTogether isn’t just a slogan – it’s how Hoosiers approach our team effort to getting back on track.**_

We’re in this together by being safe as we go out – _wearing masks, keeping a six foot distance, washing our hands, and using hand sanitizer._

But we’re also being safe by looking out for our mental health. Here’s just a few examples –
* **We’re using telehealth services:** Claims for mental health services have remained at a steady rate compared to pre-pandemic rates. And that’s because we’re seeing an increase in services provided through telehealth.
* **We’re watching out for substance use disorder:** Indiana is providing more naloxone kits directly to the public – one of the only tools available to reverse an overdose. And remember – treatment is available. Just call 211 or visit **[www.treatmentconnection.com](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d94395e4726e4b41b711c3a07ed349b0&_e=mXOIxJv037Ud5RzCDNpBYlxXnHIN4cu4AGV4-JQuPSBGsu2If7d9yPWDgWncv-S8rOGEnZNiRn6DSwU0NBE8kJVodhJOb6mIYXzPBNMiqjUKiKUhaJnJk6zvALhPzqZksk7fq7CYGJsfEQGMc041ashS73_1KcYVT6zGwdGr4n9rtgD0yrk0ctQAWm0iz43Pvv4Z9NUu0VhL5ZHyueHeiE5noA1ds3SUkQc5LU9u1hVBUSmj-lu5fyFqcrhgY36zS9sZDzXJT9yGuuQXuJN5kYa9EdQHwO5SYtHtYVTN0MlScmnSsQrPEEoZTzSNrCiLHo3QmYFD7rz2x-C5u_bx4s5b5KgW177uDJ1WpeRhLyl8iQAbP64nWfXTgdaZJQU___dkQMEEtse6dTuH_iGpww%3D%3D)** to get connected to help.
* **We’re providing resources for domestic violence and suicide prevention:** Resources are available if you’re in a bad situation at home or have thoughts of suicide. Call the Domestic Violence Hotline at 1-800-779-7233 or the Suicide Crisis Line at 1-800-273-TALK.
* **We’re using online resources for help:** Last month, Indiana unveiled a new website, **[BeWellIndiana.org](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d94395e4726e4b41b711c3a07ed349b0&_e=mXOIxJv037Ud5RzCDNpBYoReNlQNUfvYNxhma2RtzYvJWrvrzZRG_WgIp7dkl-Uh4gSVkiJmUCE-EHN5Jf2k6blfivGb2VKVWyNpqm6nR4OObAKP3FlVEof1-gQy87g7uvBpMa-LGcRVarc8H35wZ2-NSUJzdpMjWsmlw6nTgNEwmaKBUSkPPrqtSMB4N9tHxFi_dvWEKnuBC5bGZHmUZPeQpI6kpcX81jHw99F0jiE9TnLbpvyB7wGSeOawsMNMCCsU98kby5fChwyHp3NYVh0uKr6O2zHUqKS31tVJymS6QZx4b9xevITceaEXeAYEWdtOOfQda3M_mirQb0i6pHU7U0qfN7AQThnjB3evrcsZOaCKUtABjQnVFB1Pqn1q)** , that’s putting free mental health resources at Hoosiers’ fingertips. And so far, there have already been more than 10,000 clicks on the website’s resources.

And another way we look out for each other is ramping up again. _**Phase 2 of[Indiana’s scientific study of the spread of COVID-19 across our state](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d94395e4726e4b41b711c3a07ed349b0&_e=mXOIxJv037Ud5RzCDNpBYvdHxub1imL4WhgrCPY_p4MDZntiBcf4S7PlOV61F2NX9V8FjZuOG4M0ZbGbB_sw-qTTgPYJNw33RpQmDQCdyyK1jUAdOmwfDy-9UE_HNl8bmYmnSZ13hhSnJaiVjDnGTjr1-h98EaZjd7v4VjdY-fUmoIz9IGY30uN9Jg3_gX7AVG7lKCiYwoOpUDQdVwRi8KnjJ4XpywhaHof99KsFLERO-2EhfawnRMjB_VXXrw1TpDkEwoWtQjqTPMa01KiFE9f_Ss2L9UsOqB9cL-3otIjGebi2hB7rLN3Q5cnuvz5Ei4UjJeuE4vRvznUemtdg_Di7R_CN26RKieCYVE05IEKMCwxhRyc8sw-sKGKqGsT7UP8mcPLM43ywGJIib6KnaoUuS3tOGCzc4Ry3_J47AAlghRCIeiO4a6leZl9orJajHuv_Bh32QSkzmbj-UoNehSFa6IB88jKyVnU3WN3xPJypgJzqactKF8NaCQKepbAl) will begin next week**_ – with invitations to participate going out this week (ensuring a random, scientific sample).

If you get a text message or a postcard inviting you to participate – please respond. Your response helps guide Indiana’s data-driven reopening and informs our decisions – keeping our fellow Hoosiers safe.

Now more than ever, it’s critical that we remain #InThisTogether. _**It’s a critical part of our shared Hoosier playbook.**_

#BackOnTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew

clean_body: As Governor Holcomb said yesterday, #INThisTogether isn’t just a slogan – it’s how Hoosiers approach our team effort to getting back on track. | | | ---|---|--- Friends, “The words ‘In This Together’ aren't rhetorical – this is a playbook.” – Gov. Holcomb We’re now almost a week into – it’s a step-by-step playbook to Indiana’s safe and steady reopening. But it’s not the only playbook. As Governor Holcomb said yesterday, #INThisTogether isn’t just a slogan – it’s how Hoosiers approach our team effort to getting back on track. We’re in this together by being safe as we go out – wearing masks, keeping a six foot distance, washing our hands, and using hand sanitizer. But we’re also being safe by looking out for our mental health. Here’s just a few examples – We’re using telehealth services: Claims for mental health services have remained at a steady rate compared to pre-pandemic rates. And that’s because we’re seeing an increase in services provided through telehealth. We’re watching out for substance use disorder: Indiana is providing more naloxone kits directly to the public – one of the only tools available to reverse an overdose. And remember – treatment is available. Just call 211 or visit to get connected to help. We’re providing resources for domestic violence and suicide prevention: Resources are available if you’re in a bad situation at home or have thoughts of suicide. Call the Domestic Violence Hotline at 1-800-779-7233 or the Suicide Crisis Line at 1-800-273-TALK. We’re using online resources for help: Last month, Indiana unveiled a new website, , that’s putting free mental health resources at Hoosiers’ fingertips. And so far, there have already been more than 10,000 clicks on the website’s resources. And another way we look out for each other is ramping up again. Phase 2 of will begin next week – with invitations to participate going out this week (ensuring a random, scientific sample). If you get a text message or a postcard inviting you to participate – please respond. Your response helps guide Indiana’s data-driven reopening and informs our decisions – keeping our fellow Hoosiers safe. Now more than ever, it’s critical that we remain #InThisTogether. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I'm going to ask if you can donate to Warren Democrats before our end-of-month deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Our grassroots team has powered this movement further than anyone could have imagined. And with supporters like you by my side, I know we can reach our May fundraising goal and fund our work to elect | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525730/45c30650/1c8dc72dd/66e9dda2/1967856446/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make your first contribution to Warren Democrats before Sunday's midnight fundraising deadline. But first, I wanted to explain why your contribution would be so important right now:

We've set an ambitious May fundraising goal to grow our robust organizing plan to hold the Trump administration accountable and help elect Democrats up and down the ballot.

And because we're grassroots-funded, whether or not we reach this goal depends on the number of grassroots supporters who chip in before this weekend's deadline.

It's a big goal. But our grassroots team has powered this movement further than anyone could have imagined. And with supporters like you by my side, I know we can reach it together.

**[I'm only asking because your support right now would be powerfully important: If you're in a place to donate today, will you chip in $2 or whatever you can to help grow our movement and hit our goal before Sunday's deadline?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525730/45c30650/1c8dc72dd/66e9dda5/1967856446/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLW1heTIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUjE4Rl9FT01fRVdEX0VfMjAyMDA1MjhfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-may20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR18F_EOM_EWD_E_20200528_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
