#
I wanted to make sure you don't forget to RSVP to our digital house party with Pennsylvania State Representative Malcolm Kenyatta tomorrow night!
---
| [RSVP Here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=387e58854e&e=140a9b81e7 "RSVP Here")
---
| I'm honored to have Malcolm Kenyatta' support, and I hope to see you tomorrow at our event! We will kick off the house party at 6:30 cst/7:30 est.

Having a progressive champion like Rep. Kenyatta on my side in this race to flip IL-16 from red to blue means so much to me. He has dedicated his career to fighting for our shared values. **Rep. Kenyatta knows just how important it is to win in districts like IL-16 this November. **

So join us tomorrow and hear all about our plan to fight for our progressive values-and win with our progressive values- up and down the ballot this November.

I hope to see you there.

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

| Hi Peter \- I just got some terrible news that you need to hear right away.
Today we needed to raise $9,800 to keep our ads on the air until Election Day, but we're still $1,640 short.
We only have four hours to make a decision on these ads and the polls show us in a dead heat. If we don't close this gap we will lose this race.
With just 5 days left until the election, we're officially at a make-or-break moment. If you have the means, I'm asking you to give whatever you can because this race depends on it. [Please, rush $10 or more to help us keep our ads on the air, win this race, and make New Mexico better for all of us.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SUhG6ZKnPEfa6EFSQ_YmYm0S-g-L4JRdRZdQe0kcWfQRR8qNTqfQ42384-U_dsuUza_rhuSx4AqbtP3JETxyuUxBnuv4koXpuDSKczc-X2ammaKwd0w9YGaMPEalWF8OWWkEmGOY3n99-p7Hq7ghaoI2tVKCZFJ-RmKx2nwJ5luacIRh0GhQiDqioB3JQEj0&c=I9S_U4Q7Z6-VgH3DMkHI6NPORVK0Aothx2mpQV5NG24lNduQAtTHRw==&ch=ADLnndiePB04XYpzEBvpmHcX1-TGV7WnpHlQSf87-E8EVflgry2Etg==)

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Southern state Democrats stick together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek: If the COVID-19 crisis has taught us anything about governance, it's that the time for political grandstanding is over. We've got to have leaders in Congress -- and in the White House -- who are dedicated to helping American families and workers, not pushing their own agendas or vying for power. [**That's why I'm so proud to be supporting Jaime Harrison's campaign for election to the U.S. Senate from South Carolina.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1701/3e0906/7822596c/3e30dbdb/2524804889/VEsH/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-harrison?refcode=20200528_TK_Harrison&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Thats+why+Im+so+proud+to+be+supporting+J&utm_campaign=20200528_FR_TK_Harrison&source=20200528_FR_TK_Harrison") Jaime will be a reliable vote to expand affordable and high quality health care. He's promised to protect people with pre-existing conditions and stop the closure of rural hospitals. And what's more, he's ready to do that for every South Carolinian -- it's not about politics, it's about people. He's campaigning in every corner -- all 46 counties -- of the state. And unlike his conservative opponent, he knows that when a community needs help, party labels don't matter, so he's ready to work across the aisle in Washington to get things done. Jaime's determined to help flip the Senate this November. It's not going to be easy -- I'm from a Southern state, too, and I know that electing a progressive Democrat may be an uphill battle in South Carolina. **But if we work together to ensure Jaime has the resources to win, I believe he can get there.** [**If you're able to donate, will you chip in $15 or more directly to Jaime Harrison's Senate campaign?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1701/3e0906/7822596c/3e30dbda/2524804889/VEsE/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-harrison?refcode=20200528_TK_Harrison&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+If+youre+able+to+donate+will+you+chip+in&utm_campaign=20200528_FR_TK_Harrison&source=20200528_FR_TK_Harrison") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $15**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1701/3e0906/7822596c/3e30dbd9/2524804889/VEsF/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-harrison?refcode=20200528_TK_Harrison&amount=15&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+15&utm_campaign=20200528_FR_TK_Harrison&source=20200528_FR_TK_Harrison")
---
| [**DONATE $25**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1701/3e0906/7822596c/3e30dbd8/2524804889/VEsC/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-harrison?refcode=20200528_TK_Harrison&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=20200528_FR_TK_Harrison&source=20200528_FR_TK_Harrison")

---
If now's not the right time to make a donation, I understand. Another great way to support Jaime is to follow him on social media like [**Facebook**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1701/3e0906/7822596c/3e30dbdd/2524804889/VEsB/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://www.facebook.com/JaimeHarrisonSC/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=20200528_FR_TK_Harrison&source=20200528_FR_TK_Harrison") and [**Twitter**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1701/3e0906/7822596c/3e30dbdc/2524804889/VEsO/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://twitter.com/harrisonjaime?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=20200528_FR_TK_Harrison&source=20200528_FR_TK_Harrison"), and share his posts with your networks. Spreading the word about his campaign helps him gain the momentum he'll need for November.
Thanks for all your work.
-Tim

Team Kaine is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your sustained support is critical to Tim. If you'd like to donate, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1701/3e0906/7822596c/3e30dbd6/2524804889/VEsHAQ/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-support?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=14+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20200528_FR_TK_Harrison&source=20200528_FR_TK_Harrison") Thanks for having Tim's back!

Alexandria, VA 22313-0239

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Fletcher Admits She Supports Raising Property Taxes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,
One of the reasons that Texas continues to be one of the best places in America to raise a family, start a business, and live comfortably is our low tax burden.** ** We keep Texas affordable by allowing you to keep more of your hard-earned cash instead of forking it over to the government.

Most of us here in the 7th District understand that we already pay our fair share of taxes. That’s why I could not believe my eyes when I saw Congresswoman Fletcher [sign a letter](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=98736c19f42641478e21fbd62114bf37&_e=HukrVGwWpPVleYqI6KlwhHQ6vVvKw7ovB2eTfzPbFvRUDfGR0U4R5k7Vo4MS01W_bX8HLPYL_K57EtywkM63L0FPpNfDqqkDj0lDsxUvexXu6J9MHEjYljnxGI0VPYN7ZplldTk39DcpHRFZ1q3fMkm47vuoi1qTemIHFwZQw1GTcN_vk3ZcgS4y760p61iZ4ufJ_cbk_dW7PXthOkKr7Xb-SWh6EMKnklXT86_ovlh8XPCQedkSjo9HYxQxuwCW_9DJwLfZdJye3APZ7KN7ix4sKaYXM5qmE_f1aUKoTypPQKOt8-ZJnDuwGwkNHJDoB7WO2Ey9O0s6lsVs5MkCvnj_HeSFhB0cHjDoHeAn7zfgr605uh7ZgCDrUpEjmF3BK_KVY8v73eU2DDze8J9i1g%3D%3D) admitting that she supports increasing property taxes on middle-class families.

In a letter sent to Governor Abbott on May 13th, Congresswoman Fletcher along with other liberal Democrats such as Sheila Jackson Lee agreed that “We all believe in raising property taxes when times are good”.

And what’s even worse, this admission comes on the heels of Congresswoman Fletcher and Democrats in the House passing a [$3 trillion spending bill](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=98736c19f42641478e21fbd62114bf37&_e=HukrVGwWpPVleYqI6KlwhDzcLCvOXODfboQNwpgRxUv7rvU65eUvnRBS83vil92b5c95rcwzDQaZ-uVKO7ZatoUFDEsEvZUMBujuI7Kh1iXUFPdJPOu5fKudJuboTt_4sN3P-7OPgXiHhHhxsKc46EVYbhXwlQeZ4bI-GlYGFS5qwlb5Us9_NANIHaMC1R42GtLbH_QvjnvNFnAeIBmx8z6shZIkPbS1Rlm0PWdEyiwxCtcWz1mbrHP47h13JdaKMSHscABJgKCEfz36C-JR2R5jUpgKNpRP6MBbTyXvL31ddyIHfF76xfh-C9KRTLnITmRbYmZDZAvSRUUzMPAErU3dzI_DZg9TkoVvGHq8fRjUwt6WfC5aE3YEA3iH-KiA9vPXCnwwsHq42jpsspcaIsuXMOeGE4Yjz8uKIDYuzuI%3D) that sends up to $6,000 checks to illegal immigrants.

Despite her carefully rehearsed talking points, occasionally Fletcher slips up and shows her true colors. Those colors are Nancy Pelosi’s, and when Pelosi pushes for socialist schemes like Medicare for All and the Green New Deal, Fletcher will support tax increases on middle-class families to pay for them.

Tax and spend policies hurt middle-class families and small businesses in our district and Lizzie Fletcher proved once again that she is not the moderate she claimed to be in 2018.

When I'm elected to Congress, I promise to fight against wasteful spending and the middle-class tax increases that come with it. Unlike Lizzie Fletcher, I'll put our priorities, not those of Nancy Pelosi, first.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

clean_body: Friend, One of the reasons that Texas continues to be one of the best places in America to raise a family, start a business, and live comfortably is our low tax burden. We keep Texas affordable by allowing you to keep more of your hard-earned cash instead of forking it over to the government. Most of us here in the 7th District understand that we already pay our fair share of taxes. That’s why I could not believe my eyes when I saw Congresswoman Fletcher admitting that she supports increasing property taxes on middle-class families. In a letter sent to Governor Abbott on May 13th, Congresswoman Fletcher along with other liberal Democrats such as Sheila Jackson Lee agreed that “We all believe in raising property taxes when times are good”. And what’s even worse, this admission comes on the heels of Congresswoman Fletcher and Democrats in the House passing a that sends up to $6,000 checks to illegal immigrants. Despite her carefully rehearsed talking points, occasionally Fletcher slips up and shows her true colors. Those colors are Nancy Pelosi’s, and when Pelosi pushes for socialist schemes like Medicare for All and the Green New Deal, Fletcher will support tax increases on middle-class families to pay for them. Tax and spend policies hurt middle-class families and small businesses in our district and Lizzie Fletcher proved once again that she is not the moderate she claimed to be in 2018. When I'm elected to Congress, I promise to fight against wasteful spending and the middle-class tax increases that come with it. Unlike Lizzie Fletcher, I'll put our priorities, not those of Nancy Pelosi, first. Sincerely, Wesley Hunt **** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Linstrom?=
subject: Dave Lindstrom Files for U.S. Senate
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/dave-lindstrom-files-for-us-senate?e=41f8e27552)
---
| | | [ ](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=1ff63d88f6&e=41f8e27552)
---
| | | The political insiders here in Kansas are not having a good day, but when I say I have HAD ENOUGH, I mean it.

Today, I made it clear that I have HAD ENOUGH of their elitist ways, of their picking and choosing winners, and of the swamp – both here in Kansas and in Washington D.C.

That is why this morning, I made my candidacy official when I filed the official paperwork to have my name on the August 4, 2020 Republican Primary Ballot.

Since announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate here in Kansas, the political elite have done everything they can think of to stop me.

And it is time that get the message loud and clear that they do not control how We the People vote, and they do not speak for the hard working Kansans across the state who have HAD ENOUGH of the insider political games, deep pocket special interest groups, and the lack of leadership they have shown on behalf of Kansans.

Not only am I standing up to the poltical insiders by not dropping out of the race, if elected to the U.S. Senate I will sponsor legislation that will create term limits and fight to ensure Congress is required to abide by the same laws as they impose on all of us.

Will you help me send the political insiders, the ones who think they have more say than you do when it comes to who you vote for, a clear message that we have HAD ENOUGH?
---
| [HAD ENOUGH? DONATE TODAY!](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=e18d62aac1&e=41f8e27552 "HAD ENOUGH? DONATE TODAY!")
---
| Back in 2016, when Donald J. Trump announced his candidacy for President of the United States, establishment Republicans across our great nation were losing their minds. They fought tooth and nail against the political outsider and businessman who spoke directly to the people, a man who didn’t talk the talk or walk the walk of the political elite.

But what they soon realized was that Donald J. Trump was the leader our country needed. He wasn’t polished or trained to only speak the political rhetoric of the Washington D.C. elite.

Donald J. Trump, businessman and political outsider, spoke directly to We the People.

He didn’t care what political insiders thought, he wasn’t funded by deep pocket special interest groups – his only goal was to Make America Great Again.

During the 2016 election cycle, we all saw first-hand the games that those in the swamp played to control their agenda. And during that election, the American people stood up and made it clear that they have HAD ENOUGH of the political establishment hand picking who represents them.

We all thought that they would have received the message loud and clear that We the People pick who we want to represent us, not the political elite. But apparently, they still just don’t get it.

And frankly, I’ve HAD ENOUGH!

Unlike the political insiders, who count on the backroom deals they are hatching to ensure their spineless golden boy gets elected, I am counting on you.

Will you help me today?

Can I count on your contribution to send a clear message to the swamp that we have HAD ENOUGH of their backroom deals? Donate $50, $35, or $5 TODAY, and together we will send the clear message that We the People have HAD ENOUGH!

---
| [Donate Now](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=47f2217d9a&e=41f8e27552 "Donate Now")
---
| Our country is under attack by the far left, they want to destroy our inalienable rights of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness through their tyrannical socialist agenda.

Their radical agenda threatens our way of life and will destroy our economy with outrageous bank-breaking spending. They continue to attack our way of life and want nothing more than to destroy our President and the work he has done on behalf of hard working Americans. They are not doing their job of representing We the People as they continue to push their socialist agenda, rather than help our country recover from this disastrous pandemic!

I am the only proven businessman in this race who can beat Barbara Bollier and stop the democrats.
Together we will send the clear message that political insiders and deep pocket special interest groups do not speak for hard working, freedom loving Kansans like us!

Thank you for your support,

**David Lindstrom**
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=b20c834dcd&e=41f8e27552)
---
| | [](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=8fd104287a&e=41f8e27552)

| | [](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=f446e38f47&e=41f8e27552)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2020 Lindstrom for Senate, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you we thought you'd like to know more about the campaign.

**Our mailing address is:**
Lindstrom for Senate1310A Westloop Pl # 353Manhattan, KS 66502-2842
[Add us to your address book](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=fcd34823bf)

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Corrupt Barack Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
In the final days of the corrupt Obama administration's last term, Obama's close advisors did everything in their power to undermine President Trump and his incoming administration. Joe Biden knew all about it.
Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42605453&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2Mjc1NjAyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2MDU0NTMS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2Mjc1NjAyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,

In the final days of the corrupt Obama administration's last term, Obama's close advisors did everything in their power to undermine President Trump and his incoming administration. Joe Biden knew all about it.

**It is shameful and the American people need to know the truth about Obama 's 8 years of corruption and scandals. **

The mainstream media continues their dishonest streak of covering up for Barack Obama. Recently, former Democratic Senator Claire McCaskill even had the audacity to tell MSNBC that Obama didn't have a single scandal in 8 years!

**But, Peter, we know better.**

If there were truly no scandals in 8 years under Obama then can he explain:
* **Operation Fast & Furious **
* **IRS harassment of tea party patriots**
* **Sending $1.7B in cash to Iran**
* **The tragic deaths of 4 Americans in Benghazi **
* **Political unmasking of Michael Flynn**

It's disgraceful that the mainstream media is willing to continue to cover up for the corrupt Obama administration.

[**That 's why I'm starting a petition so that we can demand Barack Obama answer for his scandals and the media answer for their ongoing cover up.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2MDU0NTMS1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2Mjc1NjAyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
**
[_Sign HERE to hold Obama and the media accountable_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2MDU0NTMS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2Mjc1NjAyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

The media wants you to believe Obama was the perfect President, but we know the truth. The fact is the Obama administration was full of corruption and scandals and even to this day he has never had to answer for them!

It's up to us to do the job the media won't.
_**
[SIGN THE PETITION](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2MDU0NTMS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2Mjc1NjAyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)**_
[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2MDU0NTMS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2Mjc1NjAyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

In service,

Tom Cotton
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2MDU0NTMS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2Mjc1NjAyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Lexie, Team Christy
subject: Another downgrade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

Inside Elections just moved our race from Likely Democratic to Tilt Democratic -- a downgrade in terms of our chances to flip this seat in November.

That's why it's **SO important** that we meet our fundraising goal by Sunday night. We have to ramp up our efforts even more than before.

**We've already seen Mike Garcia fall into lockstep with the Trump Republican Party. We can't let him hold onto the seat longer than a few months.** The good news is that we are still favored in the race.

**[But we need to raise $10,000 online by Sunday night to have the resources to build our program for the summer. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: It's Official! I just filed to be your next U.S. Senator!
body:
|
---
| |
---
| Peter,

The political insiders here in Kansas are not having a good day, but when I say I have HAD ENOUGH, I mean it!

Today, I made it clear that I have HAD ENOUGH of their elitist ways, of their picking and choosing winners, and of the swamp – both here in Kansas and in Washington D.C.

That is why this morning, I made my candidacy official when I filed the official paperwork to have my name on the August 4, 2020 Republican Primary Ballot.

Since announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate here in Kansas, the political elite have done everything they can think of to stop me.

And it is time that get the message loud and clear that they do not control how We the People vote, and they do not speak for the hard working Kansans across the state who have HAD ENOUGH of the insider political games, deep pocket special interest groups, and the lack of leadership they have shown on behalf of Kansans.

Not only am I standing up to the political insiders by not dropping out of the race, if elected to the U.S. Senate I will sponsor legislation that will create term limits and fight to ensure Congress is required to abide by the same laws as they impose on all of us.

Will you help me send the political insiders, the ones who think they have more say than you do when it comes to who you vote for, a clear message that we have HAD ENOUGH?
---
| [HAD ENOUGH? DONATE TODAY!](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=f9dfc3c991&e=41f8e27552 "HAD ENOUGH? DONATE TODAY!")
---
| Back in 2016, when Donald J. Trump announced his candidacy for President of the United States, establishment Republicans across our great nation were losing their minds. They fought tooth and nail against the political outsider and businessman who spoke directly to the people, a man who didn’t talk the talk or walk the walk of the political elite.

But what they soon realized was that Donald J. Trump was the leader our country needed. He wasn’t polished or trained to only speak the political rhetoric of the Washington D.C. elite.

Donald J. Trump, businessman and political outsider, spoke directly to We the People.

He didn’t care what political insiders thought, he wasn’t funded by deep pocket special interest groups – his only goal was to Make America Great Again.

During the 2016 election cycle, we all saw first-hand the games that those in the swamp played to control their agenda. And during that election, the American people stood up and made it clear that they have HAD ENOUGH of the political establishment hand picking who represents them.

We all thought that they would have received the message loud and clear that We the People pick who we want to represent us, not the political elite. But apparently, they still just don’t get it.

And frankly, I’ve HAD ENOUGH!

Unlike the political insiders, who count on the backroom deals they are hatching to ensure their spineless golden boy gets elected, I am counting on you.

Will you help me today?

Can I count on your contribution to send a clear message to the swamp that we have HAD ENOUGH of their backroom deals? Donate $50, $35, or $5 TODAY, and together we will send the clear message that We the People have HAD ENOUGH!
---
| [Donate To Support Dave's Efforts!](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=77e79788f7&e=41f8e27552 "Donate To Support Dave's Efforts!")
---
| Our country is under attack by the far left, they want to destroy our rights of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness through their tyrannical socialist agenda.

Their radical agenda threatens our way of life and will destroy our economy with outrageous bank-breaking spending. They continue to attack our way of life and want nothing more than to destroy our President and the work he has done on behalf of hard working Americans. They are not doing their job of representing We the People as they continue to push their socialist agenda, rather than help our country recover from this disastrous pandemic!

I am the only proven businessman in this race who can beat Barbara Bollier and stop the democrats. Together we will send the clear message that political insiders and deep pocket special interest groups do not speak for hard working, freedom loving Kansans like us!

Thank you for your support,

David Lindstrom
---
| |
---
| | | | | | | [](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=39da44198d&e=41f8e27552)

Lindstrom for Senate1310A Westloop Pl # 353Manhattan, KS 66502-2842

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: BREAKING: President Trump signs order to fight online censorship
body:
Moments ago in the Oval Office, President Trump signed an Executive Order to fight online censorship by technology corporations. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e9f7f30f1e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 28, 2020
---
| | |
# **BREAKING: President Trump signs order to fight online censorship**

**Moments ago** in the Oval Office, President Trump signed an Executive Order to fight online censorship by technology corporations, including social media platforms.

**Tech bias** is a major issue facing our democracy. It challenges the free exchange of ideas and public debate that protects our civil liberties. Every citizen—liberal, conservative, or otherwise—has a right to be heard and treated fairly online.

**🎬 **[WATCH: President Trump announces executive action to fight online censorship](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=36c99e1cf2&e=3ee4985eea "https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1266104188112601089")

**In the next few hours** , you may hear a lot about this Executive Order. Leftwing media will claim it addresses a fake problem because tech bias doesn’t exist. Democrats in Congress will say the President is exceeding his authority. Some in the Beltway establishment will say the order doesn’t do that much in the first place.

**All of these are lies**. Here are a few of the key actions in President Trump’s order:
* Makes it U.S. policy that platforms who selectively edit, censor, or are not acting in “good faith” with regards to content will **not receive the liability protection** included in Section 230 of the Communications Decency Act

* Directs the Commerce Department to **petition the FCC to make clarifying rules** on Section 230 in line with U.S. policy

* Helps **stop millions of taxpayer dollars from being wasted** by federal agencies on advertising with biased social media platforms

* Ensures the Justice Department will **review more than 16,000 complaints** about politically motivated censorship that were collected by the White House in advance of a [Social Media Summit held last year](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=760c0e6ffe&e=3ee4985eea)

* Mobilizes State Attorneys General—who have massive subpoena and consumer protection authorities—to **ensure social media platforms are not engaging in unfair or deceptive acts** or practices

* Acts as federal law and **lists the many ways in which tech platforms act with bias** against viewpoints they disagree with

**Massive corporations** that treat millions of American citizens unfairly shouldn’t expect special privileges and protections under the law. With President Trump’s Executive Order today, our country is one step closer to having an honest, fair public debate.

[_Read President Trump’s Executive Order on censorship here._](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d7433ba059&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE** : [33 Examples of Twitter’s Anti-Conservative Bias](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8131cac3d3&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.newsbusters.org/blogs/techwatch/nb-staff/2020/05/28/33-examples-twitters-anti-conservative-bias")
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump, joined by United States Attorney General William Barr, signed an Executive Order on Preventing Online Censorship** | May 28, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7d2320ea1d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dbd34460f2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ace9ccf72f)
---

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b149/18e32a7f/4c6fabc3/7b21bcd3/3387285564/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b149/18e32a7f/4c6fabc3/7b21bcd0/3387285564/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b149/18e32a7f/4c6fabc3/7b21bcd1/3387285564/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b149/18e32a7f/4c6fabc3/7b21bcdd/3387285564/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_.
